```typescript
/**
 * Webview 根组件。
 * 三标签页：工作台 / 任务 / 设置。
 * 使用 Radix Tabs，切换保留各页内部状态。
 */

import React, { useState, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';
import WorkbenchTab from './WorkbenchTab';
import TasksTab from './TasksTab';
import SettingsTab from './SettingsTab';
import { AppConfig, MdInfo, Task, HistoryItem, MaterialLib, ExtMessage, WebviewMessage } from '../shared';

const vscodeApi = (window as any).acquireVsCodeApi?.() ?? {
  postMessage: (_msg: WebviewMessage) => {},
  getState: () => ({}),
  setState: (_s: unknown) => {},
};

export default function App(): React.ReactElement {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<AppConfig | null>(null);
  const [currentMd, setCurrentMd] = useState<MdInfo | null>(null);
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
  const [history, setHistory] = useState<HistoryItem[]>([]);
  const [materialLibs, setMaterialLibs] = useState<MaterialLib[]>([]);
  const [errorMsg, setErrorMsg] = useState('');
  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);

  // 监听来自扩展的消息
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (ev: MessageEvent<ExtMessage>) => {
      const msg = ev.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'init':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setCurrentMd(msg.currentMd);
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          setMaterialLibs(msg.materialLibs);
          break;
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig(prev => prev ? { ...prev, ...msg.config } : null);
          break;
        case 'taskUpdate':
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          break;
        case 'historyUpdate':
          setHistory(msg.history);
          break;
        case 'currentMdUpdate':
          setCurrentMd(msg.md);
          break;
        case 'error':
          setErrorMsg(msg.message);
          setIsGenerating(false);
          break;
        case 'generationStarted':
          setIsGenerating(true);
          setErrorMsg('');
          break;
        case 'materialLibsUpdate':
          setMaterialLibs(msg.libs);
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    // 挂载后请求初始数据
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const sendConfig = useCallback((key: string, value: unknown) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key, value });
  }, []);

  const handleGenerate = useCallback(() => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'generate' });
  }, []);

  if (!config) {
    return <div className="loading">加载中…</div>;
  }

  return (
    <Tabs.Root className="tabs-root" defaultValue="workbench">
      <Tabs.List className="tabs-list" aria-label="标签页">
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="workbench">工作台</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="tasks">任务</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="settings">设置</Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="workbench" forceMount style={{ display: 'none' }}>
        <WorkbenchTab
          config={config}
          currentMd={currentMd}
          isGenerating={isGenerating}
          errorMsg={errorMsg}
          materialLibs={materialLibs}
          onConfigChange={sendConfig}
          onGenerate={handleGenerate}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="tasks" forceMount style={{ display: 'none' }}>
        <TasksTab
          tasks={tasks}
          history={history}
          tasksCols={config.tasksCols}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="settings" forceMount style={{ display: 'none' }}>
        <SettingsTab
          config={config}
          onConfigChange={sendConfig}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
}

```
</details>

/**
 * 任务管理器（spec §7.2 / §7.4）。
 * 单定时器后台轮询 + globalState 持久化 + 重启续拉。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'node:path';
import * as fs from 'node:fs/promises';
import { Task, Job, JobStatus } from './shared';
import { queryResult } from './api';
import { getApiKey } from './config';
import { loadTasks, saveTasks } from './config';
import { extFromUrl } from './image-utils';
import type { SidebarProvider } from './sidebar-provider';

const POLL_INTERVAL = 4_000; // 4s
const JOB_TIMEOUT = 10 * 60 * 1_000; // 10 分钟
const DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT = 30_000;

// ─── 工具 ───

function safeExt(url: string): string {
  return extFromUrl(url) || 'png';
}

async function downloadImage(url: string, filePath: string): Promise<string> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), DOWNLOAD_TIMEOUT);
  try {
    const response = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal });
    const buffer = Buffer.from(await response.arrayBuffer());
    await fs.writeFile(filePath, buffer);
    return filePath;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

// ─── TaskManager ───

export class TaskManager {
  private tasks: Task[] = [];
  private timer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null;
  private polling = false;
  private sidebar: SidebarProvider | null = null;

  constructor(private context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {}

  setSidebar(sidebar: SidebarProvider): void {
    this.sidebar = sidebar;
  }

  /** 提交完成后注册任务，启动轮询 */
  addTask(task: Task): void {
    this.tasks.push(task);
    this.persist();
    this.pushTasks();
    this.ensureTimer();
  }

  /** 激活时恢复未完成任务 */
  async resume(): Promise<void> {
    const stored = loadTasks(this.context);
    let changed = false;

    for (const task of stored) {
      for (const job of task.jobs) {
        if (job.status === 'submitting' && !job.id) {
          job.status = 'failed';
          job.error = '提交未完成';
          changed = true;
        }
      }
      // 过滤已完成任务
      const hasActive = task.jobs.some(
        (j) => j.status === 'running' || j.status === 'submitting',
      );
      if (hasActive) {
        // 重置会话计时（用于超时判定），但保留真实开始时间
        task.sessionStartedAt = Date.now();
        this.tasks.push(task);
        changed = true;
      }
    }

    if (changed) {
      await this.persist();
    }

    if (this.tasks.length > 0) {
      this.pushTasks();
      this.ensureTimer();
      // 立即执行一次轮询
      this.poll().catch(() => {});
    }
  }

  // ========== 定时器 ==========

  private ensureTimer(): void {
    if (this.timer) return;
    this.timer = setInterval(() => {
      this.poll().catch(() => {});
    }, POLL_INTERVAL);
  }

  private stopTimer(): void {
    if (this.timer) {
      clearInterval(this.timer);
      this.timer = null;
    }
  }

  // ========== 轮询 ==========

  private async poll(): Promise<void> {
    if (this.polling) return; // 重入锁
    this.polling = true;

    try {
      const apiKey = await getApiKey(this.context.secrets);
      if (!apiKey) return;

      let hasRunning = false;
      const now = Date.now();

      for (const task of this.tasks) {
        for (const job of task.jobs) {
          // 超时判定（本会话起算）
          if (job.status === 'running' && now - task.sessionStartedAt > JOB_TIMEOUT) {
            job.status = 'failed';
            job.error = '生成超时（10 分钟）';
            continue;
          }

          if (job.status === 'running' && job.id) {
            hasRunning = true;
            try {
              const result = await queryResult(task.baseUrl, apiKey, job.id);
              job.progress = result.progress;
              if (result.status === 'succeeded' && result.results) {
                const paths: string[] = [];
                for (const item of result.results) {
                  const ext = safeExt(item.url);
                  const seq = this.nextImageIndex(task);
                  const fileName = `${task.mdFileName}-${seq}.${ext}`;
                  const filePath = path.join(task.folderPath, fileName);
                  await downloadImage(item.url, filePath);
                  paths.push(filePath);
                }
                job.status = 'succeeded';
                job.images = paths;
              } else if (result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
                job.status = result.status;
                job.error = result.error;
              }
            } catch (err) {
              // 网络瞬时错误静默重试
              job.progress = undefined;
            }
          }
        }

        // 检查任务是否全部终结
        if (task.jobs.every((j) => isTerminal(j.status))) {
          await this.finalizeTask(task);
        }
      }

      await this.persist();
      this.pushTasks();

      if (!hasRunning) {
        this.stopTimer();
      }
    } finally {
      this.polling = false;
    }
  }

  /** 任务内下一个图片序号（跨 job 接续编号） */
  private nextImageIndex(task: Task): number {
    let max = 0;
    for (const job of task.jobs) {
      if (job.images) {
        for (const img of job.images) {
          const base = path.basename(img, path.extname(img));
          const parts = base.split('-');
          const n = parseInt(parts[parts.length - 1], 10);
          if (!isNaN(n) && n > max) max = n;
        }
      }
    }
    return max + 1;
  }

  /** 任务终结处理：通知 + 移除 + 清理 */
  private async finalizeTask(task: Task): Promise<void> {
    const succeeded = task.jobs.filter((j) => j.status === 'succeeded').length;
    const failures = task.jobs
      .filter((j) => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation')
      .map((j) => j.error ?? '未知错误')
      .filter((e, i, arr) => arr.indexOf(e) === i);

    // 从活动列表移除
    this.tasks = this.tasks.filter((t) => t !== task);

    // 通知
    if (succeeded > 0) {
      if (failures.length > 0) {
        vscode.window.showWarningMessage(
          `部分图片生成失败：\n${failures.join('\n')}`,
        );
      } else {
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage(
          `生成完成（${succeeded} 张），已保存到 ${task.folderName}`,
        );
      }
    } else {
      // 无成图 → 删空文件夹 + 错误通知
      try {
        await fs.rmdir(task.folderPath);
      } catch {
        /* 文件夹不空则忽略 */
      }
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
        `生成失败：\n${failures.join('\n')}`,
      );
    }
  }

  // ========== 持久化与通知 ==========

  private pushTasks(): void {
    this.sidebar?.postMessage({ type: 'taskUpdate', tasks: this.tasks });
  }

  private async persist(): Promise<void> {
    await saveTasks(this.context, this.tasks);
  }
}

function isTerminal(s: JobStatus): boolean {
  return s === 'succeeded' || s === 'failed' || s === 'violation';
}

```

/**
 * 生成流程编排（spec §7）。
 * M3：改为 replyType:async 提交，返回 Task 由 TaskManager 接管轮询。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'node:path';
import * as fs from 'node:fs/promises';
import { parseReferences, validateNotEmpty } from './markdown-parser';
import { submitGenerate } from './api';
import { mimeFromPath } from './image-utils';
import { getConfig, ensureApiKey } from './config';
import type { Task, Job } from './shared';

// ─── 工具 ───

/** 格式化时间戳：yyMMddHHmmSS */
function timestamp(): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const y = String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const M = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const d = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const h = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const m = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const s = String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${y}${M}${d}${h}${m}${s}`;
}

/** 已有的同秒任务文件夹数 → seq */
async function nextSeq(parentDir: string, ts: string): Promise<number> {
  let seq = 1;
  const prefix = `task-${ts}-`;
  try {
    const entries = await fs.readdir(parentDir);
    const existing = entries.filter((n) => n.startsWith(prefix));
    const nums = existing
      .map((n) => parseInt(n.slice(prefix.length), 10))
      .filter((n) => !isNaN(n));
    if (nums.length > 0) {
      seq = Math.max(...nums) + 1;
    }
  } catch {
    // 目录不存在或无权限，seq 从 1 开始
  }
  return seq;
}

/** 读取 Markdown 文件所在目录同级参考图，转为 data URI */
async function readReferenceImages(
  mdDir: string,
  refPaths: string[],
): Promise<string[]> {
  const errors: string[] = [];
  const images: string[] = [];

  for (const refPath of refPaths) {
    const resolved = path.resolve(mdDir, refPath);
    try {
      const buffer = await fs.readFile(resolved);
      const mime = mimeFromPath(resolved);
      const b64 = buffer.toString('base64');
      images.push(`data:${mime};base64,${b64}`);
    } catch {
      errors.push(refPath);
    }
  }

  if (errors.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
  }

  return images;
}

// ─── 主流程 ───

/**
 * 对单个 Markdown 文件执行异步生成提交。
 * 返回待注册到 TaskManager 的 Task 对象。
 * 若全部提交失败返回 null（已内部清理）。
 */
export async function generateForMarkdown(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
): Promise<Task | null> {
  // 1. 校验 apiKey
  const apiKey = await ensureApiKey(context);

  // 2. 读取 Markdown 内容
  const mdContent = Buffer.from(await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri)).toString('utf-8');
  validateNotEmpty(mdContent);

  // 3. 解析参考图
  const { references, replacedText } = parseReferences(mdContent);

  // 4. 读取参考图并编码
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const refPaths = references.map((r) => r.path);
  const images = await readReferenceImages(mdDir, refPaths);

  // 5. 获取配置
  const config = getConfig(context);
  const mdFileName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

  // 6. 创建任务文件夹
  const ts = timestamp();
  const seq = await nextSeq(mdDir, ts);
  const folderName = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
  const folderPath = path.join(mdDir, folderName);
  await fs.mkdir(folderPath, { recursive: true });

  // 7. 异步并发提交 N 个 job
  const N = config.concurrency;
  const jobs: Job[] = [];
  const submitPromises = Array.from({ length: N }, () =>
    submitGenerate(config.baseUrl, apiKey, {
      model: config.model,
      prompt: replacedText,
      images: images.length > 0 ? images : undefined,
      aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
      imageSize: config.imageSize,
      replyType: 'async',
    }).then(
      (resp) => ({ ok: true as const, response: resp }),
      (err) => ({ ok: false as const, error: String(err) }),
    ),
  );

  const settled = await Promise.all(submitPromises);
  for (const r of settled) {
    if (r.ok && r.response.status === 'running') {
      jobs.push({
        id: r.response.id,
        status: 'running',
        progress: r.response.progress ?? 0,
      });
    } else if (r.ok) {
      // 直接返回了终态
      jobs.push({
        id: r.response.id,
        status: r.response.status as Job['status'],
        error: r.response.error,
      });
    } else {
      jobs.push({ status: 'failed', error: r.error });
    }
  }

  // 8. 全部提交失败 → 清理并返回 null
  const allFailed = jobs.every((j) => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation');
  if (allFailed) {
    const errors = [...new Set(jobs.map((j) => j.error!).filter(Boolean))];
    try { await fs.rmdir(folderPath); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`所有请求提交失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
    return null;
  }

  // 9. 构建 Task 对象
  const task: Task = {
    folderName,
    folderPath,
    mdFileName,
    model: config.model,
    baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
    jobs,
    startedAt: Date.now(),
    sessionStartedAt: Date.now(),
    status: 'active',
  };

  return task;
}

```

```typescript
/**
 * 侧栏 WebviewViewProvider（spec §8）。
 * 负责 Webview 生命周期、CSP、postMessage 双向通信。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as crypto from 'node:crypto';
import { getAppConfig, getConfig, updateConfig, setApiKey } from './config';
import { AppConfig, MdInfo, ExtMessage, WebviewMessage } from './shared';

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;
  private _currentMd: MdInfo | null = null;

  constructor(private readonly context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    this._view = webviewView;
    const extUri = this.context.extensionUri;

    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [
        vscode.Uri.joinPath(extUri, 'media'),
        ...(vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.map(f => f.uri) ?? []),
      ],
    };

    const nonce = crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('base64');
    webviewView.webview.html = this.buildHtml(webviewView.webview, nonce);

    // 双向消息
    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(async (msg: WebviewMessage) => {
      await this.handleMessage(msg, webviewView.webview);
    });

    // 监听活动编辑器变化 → 通知前端
    this.context.subscriptions.push(
      vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor(async (editor) => {
        await this.trackActiveEditor(webviewView.webview, editor);
      }),
    );

    // 初始跟踪当前编辑器
    this.trackActiveEditor(webviewView.webview, vscode.window.activeTextEditor);
  }

  /** 向 Webview 发送消息 */
  postMessage(msg: ExtMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  // ========== 消息处理 ==========

  private async handleMessage(msg: WebviewMessage, _webview: vscode.Webview): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init': {
        const config = await getAppConfig(this.context);
        this.postMessage({
          type: 'init',
          config,
          currentMd: this._currentMd,
          tasks: [],
          history: [],
          materialLibs: [],
        });
        break;
      }
      case 'generate': {
        // M3 异步任务后充实，M2 暂走 M1 同步流程
        if (this._currentMd) {
          try {
            const { generateForMarkdown } = await import('./generate');
            const uri = vscode.Uri.file(this._currentMd.path);
            await generateForMarkdown(this.context, uri);
          } catch (err) {
            const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
            this.postMessage({ type: 'error', message: msg });
          }
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'previewRequest': {
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本中实现');
        break;
      }
      case 'setConfig': {
        if (msg.key === 'apiKey') {
          await setApiKey(this.context.secrets, String(msg.value));
          // secrets 不回传，仅通知前端已保存
          this.postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', config: { apiKey: '••••••' } as Partial<AppConfig> });
        } else {
          await updateConfig(this.context, msg.key as keyof AppConfig, msg.value);
          const updated = getConfig(this.context);
          this.postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', config: { ...updated, apiKey: '' } as Partial<AppConfig> });
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'openExternalUrl': {
        await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(msg.url));
        break;
      }
      case 'addMaterialLib':
      case 'removeMaterialLib':
      case 'openImage':
      case 'insertReference':
        // M4 实现
        break;
    }
  }

  // ========== 编辑器跟踪 ==========

  private async trackActiveEditor(
    webview: vscode.Webview,
    editor: vscode.TextEditor | undefined,
  ): Promise<void> {
    const doc = editor?.document;
    if (doc && doc.uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      const newMd: MdInfo = {
        path: doc.uri.fsPath,
        fileName: doc.fileName.split(/[/\\]/).pop() ?? doc.fileName,
      };
      // 仅在 MD 变化时推送
      if (!this._currentMd || this._currentMd.path !== newMd.path) {
        this._currentMd = newMd;
        this.postMessage({ type: 'currentMdUpdate', md: newMd });
      }
    }
    // 非 MD 不清空 currentMd（spec §8.2）
  }

  // ========== HTML 构造 ==========

  private buildHtml(webview: vscode.Webview, nonce: string): string {
    const sidebarUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const styleUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );
    const cspSource = webview.cspSource;

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 img-src ${cspSource} data: https:;
                 style-src ${cspSource} 'unsafe-inline';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}';
                 font-src ${cspSource};">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${styleUri}">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * image-flow 扩展入口（spec §3）。
 * M1：注册命令，对接生成流程。
 * M2：侧栏 Provider 使用 React Webview。
 * M3：TaskManager 异步轮询 + 持久化。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { generateForMarkdown } from './generate';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebar-provider';
import { TaskManager } from './task-manager';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  // ─── 任务管理器（异步轮询 + 持久化） ───

  const taskManager = new TaskManager(context);

  // ─── 命令：生成 AI 图片 ───

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      try {
        const targetUri = uri ?? vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
        if (!targetUri) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
          return;
        }
        if (!targetUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('仅支持 Markdown (.md) 文件');
          return;
        }

        const task = await generateForMarkdown(context, targetUri);
        if (task) {
          taskManager.addTask(task);
        }
      } catch (err) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
      }
    }),
  );

  // ─── 命令：预览请求（M5 实现，M1 占位） ───

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async () => {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本中实现');
    }),
  );

  // ─── 侧栏 Provider ───

  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context, taskManager);
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
  );

  taskManager.setSidebar(sidebarProvider);

  // ─── 重启续拉 ───

  taskManager.resume().catch(() => {});
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // 定时器随进程销毁自动清除；globalState 持久化由 TaskManager 在状态变更时即时落盘
}

```
</details>

/**
 * 任务标签页（spec §8.4）。
 * M2 占位——M3 异步任务机制 + M7 体验打磨后充实。
 */

import React from 'react';
import { Task, HistoryItem } from '../shared';

interface Props {
  tasks: Task[];
  history: HistoryItem[];
  tasksCols: number;
}

export default function TasksTab({ tasks, history }: Props): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <div className="tasks-tab">
      {tasks.length === 0 && history.length === 0 ? (
        <p className="empty-hint">暂无任务。在工作台中点击「生成」开始。</p>
      ) : (
        <>
          {tasks.map(t => (
            <div key={t.folderName} className="task-card">
              <div className="task-card-title">{t.folderName}（{t.model}）</div>
              <div className="task-card-status">
                {t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length}/{t.jobs.length} 完成
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612144918/src/webview/TasksTab.tsx</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * 任务标签页（spec §8.4）。
 * M3：显示异步任务状态与进度。M7 补充进度条与计时。
 */

import React from 'react';
import { Task, HistoryItem } from '../shared';

interface Props {
  tasks: Task[];
  history: HistoryItem[];
  tasksCols: number;
}

function jobLabel(job: { status: string; progress?: number }): string {
  switch (job.status) {
    case 'submitting':
      return '提交中';
    case 'running':
      return `生成中 ${job.progress ?? 0}%`;
    case 'succeeded':
      return '完成';
    case 'failed':
      return '失败';
    case 'violation':
      return '违规';
    default:
      return job.status;
  }
}

export default function TasksTab({ tasks, history }: Props): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <div className="tasks-tab">
      {tasks.length === 0 && history.length === 0 ? (
        <p className="empty-hint">暂无任务。在工作台中点击「生成」开始。</p>
      ) : (
        <>
          {tasks.map(t => {
            const done = t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length;
            const failed = t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation').length;
            return (
              <div key={t.folderName} className="task-card">
                <div className="task-card-title">
                  {t.folderName}（{t.model}）
                </div>
                <div className="task-card-status">
                  {done}/{t.jobs.length} 完成
                  {failed > 0 && <span className="task-fail-count"> · {failed} 失败</span>}
                </div>
                <div className="task-job-list">
                  {t.jobs.map((j, i) => (
                    <span key={i} className={`task-job-tag job-${j.status}`}>
                      #{i + 1} {jobLabel(j)}
                    </span>
                  ))}
                </div>
              </div>
            );
          })}
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

```
</details>

  background: var(--vscode-button-secondaryHoverBackground);

/* ── 状态行 ── */

.status-line {
  font-size: 13px;
  padding: 6px 8px;
  border-radius: 3px;
}
.status-line.error {
  color: var(--vscode-errorForeground);
  background: var(--vscode-inputValidation-errorBackground);

}

/* ── 任务标签页 ── */

.tasks-tab {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
}

.empty-hint {
  font-size: 13px;
  color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);
  text-align: center;

}

.task-card {
  padding: 10px 12px;

  border-radius: 4px;
  background: var(--vscode-editor-background, var(--vscode-sideBar-background));
}

}

.task-card-status {
  font-size: 12px;
  color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);
}

/* ── 设置标签页 ── */

.settings {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 14px;
}

.setting-group {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 5px;
}

.setting-label {
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: var(--vscode-sideBarTitle-foreground);
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.setting-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 8px;
  align-items: center;
}

.setting-input {
  flex: 1;
  padding: 5px 7px;
  font-family: var(--vscode-font-family);
  font-size: 13px;
  background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground);
  border: 1px solid var(--vscode-input-border, var(--vscode-dropdown-border));

}

.setting-input:focus {
  outline: 1px solid var(--vscode-focusBorder);

}

.setting-select {
  padding: 5px 7px;
  font-family: var(--vscode-font-family);
  font-size: 13px;
  background: var(--vscode-input-background);
  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground);

}

.setting-select:focus {

}

.setting-number {

  color: var(--vscode-input-foreground);

}

}

.setting-textarea {

  font-family: var(--vscode-editor-font-family, var(--vscode-font-family));
  font-size: 13px;
  background: var(--vscode-input-background);

}

.setting-textarea:focus {

}

/* ── 加载状态 ── */

.loading {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  height: 100%;
  font-size: 14px;
  color: var(--vscode-descriptionForeground);
}

> **M2 Bug 修复**：三个 `Tabs.Content` 去掉了硬编码 `style={{ display: 'none' }}`，改为 CSS 规则 `.tabs-content[data-state='inactive'] { display: none; }`——Radix 通过 `data-state` 属性控制可见性，inline style 会覆盖它。
> 
> **M3 实施内容**：
> 
> | 文件 | 变更 |
> |---|---|
> | `src/task-manager.ts`（新）| 单例任务管理器：单定时器（4s）、重入锁、异步轮询、job 超时判定（10min）、图片下载（跨 job 接续编号）、持久化与重启续拉（submitting 无 id → 判失败）、终结清理（有成图→警告 / 无成图→错误+删空文件夹）、轮询结束自动停计时器 |
> | `src/generate.ts` | 改为 `replyType: "async"` 提交 → 返回 `Task` 对象而非阻塞等待；全部提交失败则清理文件夹返回 null |
> | `src/extension.ts` | 创建 TaskManager → 注入 SidebarProvider → `resume()` 恢复未完成任务 |
> | `src/sidebar-provider.ts` | 接收 TaskManager；`generate` 消息处理改为调用 `generateForMarkdown` 后 `taskManager.addTask(task)` |
> | `src/config.ts` | 新增 `loadTasks`/`saveTasks` 持久化函数 |
> | `src/shared.ts` | Task 类型新增 `baseUrl` 字段 |
> | `src/webview/TasksTab.tsx` | 显示各 job 状态标签（提交中/生成中 N%/完成/失败/违规） |
> 
> 验证：check-types（双 tsc）0 error，lint 0 error，esbuild 双包成功。

> Let me review the M4 requirements from the spec:
> 
> **§10. 素材库**
> 
> 工作台素材库区分两段，缩略图行为一致：左键打开原图，**右键把图片以相对路径 Markdown 引用插入生效 MD 的光标处**。
> 
> ### 10.1 自动素材库（「当前路径」）
> - 按生效 MD 的路径自动生成：从工作区根的下一层目录起，到 MD 所在目录为止，**每一层各成一个库**（不含工作区根那层），只取该层目录里直接的图片（不递归）。
> - 无图片的层不显示；MD 不在工作区内则为空。
> 
> ### 10.2 手动素材库
> - 「+ 添加」弹系统文件夹选择器，选中目录加入（去重）；每个库可单独移除。
> - 每个库**递归**扫描图片，深度上限 3 层、条目数上限 500（防止误加超大目录卡死）。
> - 列表存 `workspaceState`。
> 
> ### 10.3 插入引用规则
> - 仅当当前活动编辑器**正是**生效 MD 时才插入，否则警告并忽略（防插错文件）。
> - 路径取相对 MD 目录的 POSIX 风格相对路径，非 `..` 开头时加 `./` 前缀。
> - 路径含空格或半角括号时用 `<>` 包裹（与 §5 的解析端对应）；跨盘符无法相对引用时警告并放弃。
> - alt 文本取图片文件名（去扩展名）。
> 
> Also need to check §5 about the parser for `<>` wrapping compatibility.

> Let me also check:

> - §8.3: Workbench tab - upper area is material library area

> - Paths with spaces/parens get `<>` wrapping
> - Alt text = filename without extension
> - Cross-drive: warn and skip

> For the webview right-click behavior:

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612144918/src/image-utils.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * 图片类型白名单与 MIME 工具函数。纯函数，无 VS Code 依赖。
 */

/** 图片扩展名白名单（spec §11） */
const IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST = new Set([
  'png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg',
]);

/** 扩展名 → MIME 类型映射 */
const EXT_TO_MIME: Record<string, string> = {
  png: 'image/png',
  jpg: 'image/jpeg',
  jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
  gif: 'image/gif',
  webp: 'image/webp',
  bmp: 'image/bmp',
  svg: 'image/svg+xml',
};

/** 判断文件名是否为图片 */
export function isImageFile(name: string): boolean {
  const ext = name.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
  return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext);
}

/** 从 URL 提取扩展名并校验白名单，无效则返回空串 */
export function extFromUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const pathname = new URL(url).pathname;
    const ext = pathname.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
    return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext) ? ext : '';
  } catch {
    return '';
  }
}

/** 扩展名 → MIME，不在白名单返回 png 的 MIME */
export function mimeFromExt(ext: string): string {
  return EXT_TO_MIME[ext.toLowerCase()] ?? 'image/png';
}

/** 从本地路径提取扩展名 */
export function extFromPath(filePath: string): string {
  const ext = filePath.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
  return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext) ? ext : '';
}

/** 从本地路径推导 MIME */
export function mimeFromPath(filePath: string): string {
  return mimeFromExt(extFromPath(filePath));
}

```
</details>

> 
> ### Architecture
> 
> **src/material-lib.ts** (new) - Core logic:
> - `scanImagesFlat(dir: string): string[]` - scan single directory for images (non-recursive)
> - `scanImagesRecursive(root: string): string[]` - recursive scan, max depth 3, max 500 entries
> - `buildAutoLibs(currentMdPath: string): MaterialLib[]` - given MD path, build auto libs per §10.1
> - `scanManualLib(root: string): MaterialLib` - scan one manual lib directory
> 
> **src/sidebar-provider.ts** updates:
> - Handle `addMaterialLib`: open folder picker → add to workspaceState → rescan → push
> - Handle `removeMaterialLib`: remove from workspaceState → push
> - Handle `openImage`: `vscode.commands.executeCommand('vscode.open', vscode.Uri.file(path))`
> - Handle `insertReference`: build markdown ref, insert at cursor
> - Push `materialLibsUpdate` when currentMd changes
> - On `trackActiveEditor` MD change: scan auto libs + push
> - Need to convert image paths to webview URIs before sending
> 
> **src/webview/WorkbenchTab.tsx** updates:
> - Add material library sections (auto + manual) above controls
> - Left click → post `openImage`
> - Right click → prevent default, post `insertReference`
> 
> **New webview component** maybe `MaterialLibSection.tsx` to keep WorkbenchTab clean
> 
> Let me think about the image paths. The extension-side scanning produces absolute file paths. Before sending to webview, these must be converted using `webview.asWebviewUri()`. But the webview also needs the original path to pass back for `openImage` and `insertReference`. So I should send both:
> - `uri`: webview URI for display
> - `path`: original absolute path for actions
> 
> Wait, looking at the current `MaterialLib` type:
> ```ts
> export interface MaterialLib {
>   name: string;
>   path: string;
>   images: string[];
>   isAuto: boolean;
> }
> ```
> 
> The `images` field currently has `string[]`. For the webview, these should be webview URIs. But for `openImage` and `insertReference`, I need the original file path.
> 
> I have two options:
> 1. Send both fields (original paths + webview URIs)
> 2. Send webview URIs and derive original paths on the extension side when needed
> 
> Option 2 is harder because webview URIs might not map back cleanly. Let me use option 1: add an `imagePaths` field for original paths and use `images` for webview URIs. Or better, create a separate type for the webview.
> 
> Actually, let me think more carefully. The MaterialLib is part of the shared types. Let me add an `imagePaths` field to track original paths alongside display URIs. But that's cumbersome.
> 
> Simpler approach: change `images` to store an array of `{path: string, uri: string}` objects. But the type is shared and used in ExtMessage...
> 
> Actually, the cleanest solution: keep `images` as webview URIs (for display), and derive the original path from the image filename + lib path when the extension receives an `openImage` or `insertReference` message. The webview sends the webview URI, and the extension can look it up.
> 
> No wait, let me just make it simple. The webview sends the webview URI. The extension receives it. But how does the extension know the original file path from a webview URI? It doesn't easily.
> 
> OK let me just use a practical approach: the `images` array contains the webview URIs. When the user clicks on an image, the webview sends the index and lib name. The extension looks up the original path from its cached scan results. But the extension needs to cache the scan results somewhere.
> 
> Actually, the simplest: in the MaterialLib type, add a separate field `imagePaths: string[]` for original absolute paths, parallel to `images: string[]` for webview URIs.
>

```typescript
/**
 * 素材库扫描与管理（spec §10）。
 * 自动素材库：MD 路径逐层向上、每层直接图片（不递归）。
 * 手动素材库：递归扫描，深度上限 3、条目上限 500。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'node:path';
import * as fs from 'node:fs';
import { MaterialLib } from './shared';
import { isImageFile } from './image-utils';
import { getMaterialLibPaths, setMaterialLibPaths } from './config';

const MAX_DEPTH = 3;
const MAX_ENTRIES = 500;
const AUTO_LIB_MAX_DEPTH = 10; // 防止异常路径无限循环

// ─── 通用扫描 ───

/** 扫描单个目录中的直接图片（非递归），返回绝对路径列表 */
function scanImagesFlat(dir: string): string[] {
  try {
    return fs.readdirSync(dir)
      .map(f => path.join(dir, f))
      .filter(f => fs.statSync(f).isFile() && isImageFile(f))
      .sort();
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

/** 递归扫描图片，深度上限 3、条目上限 500，返回绝对路径列表 */
function scanImagesRecursive(root: string): string[] {
  const results: string[] = [];
  const stack: Array<{ dir: string; depth: number }> = [{ dir: root, depth: 0 }];

  while (stack.length > 0 && results.length < MAX_ENTRIES) {
    const { dir, depth } = stack.pop()!;
    if (depth >= MAX_DEPTH) continue;

    let entries: fs.Dirent[];
    try {
      entries = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
    } catch {
      continue;
    }

    for (const entry of entries) {
      if (results.length >= MAX_ENTRIES) break;
      const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);
      if (entry.isDirectory()) {
        stack.push({ dir: fullPath, depth: depth + 1 });
      } else if (entry.isFile() && isImageFile(entry.name)) {
        results.push(fullPath);
      }
    }
  }

  return results.sort();
}

// ─── 自动素材库 ───

/**
 * 根据生效 MD 路径构建自动素材库列表。
 * 从工作区根下一层到 MD 所在目录，每层取直接图片（不递归）。
 */
export function buildAutoLibs(
  currentMdPath: string,
  workspaceRoot: string,
): MaterialLib[] {
  const libs: MaterialLib[] = [];
  const normalizedMd = path.resolve(currentMdPath);
  const normalizedRoot = path.resolve(workspaceRoot);

  // MD 不在工作区内
  if (!normalizedMd.startsWith(normalizedRoot + path.sep) && normalizedMd !== normalizedRoot) {
    return [];
  }

  // 从 MD 所在目录向上，到工作区根下一层为止
  let current = path.dirname(normalizedMd);
  let depth = 0;

  while (current.startsWith(normalizedRoot + path.sep) && depth < AUTO_LIB_MAX_DEPTH) {
    depth++;
    // 不含工作区根那层
    if (current === normalizedRoot) break;

    const images = scanImagesFlat(current);
    if (images.length > 0) {
      // 库名：工作区根到该目录的相对路径
      const relDir = path.relative(normalizedRoot, current) || path.basename(current);
      libs.push({
        name: relDir,
        path: current,
        images: [],      // 由调用方填充 webview URI
        imagePaths: images,
        isAuto: true,
      });
    }

    current = path.dirname(current);
  }

  return libs;
}

// ─── 手动素材库 ───

/** 添加手动素材库路径（去重） */
export async function addManualLib(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  dirPath: string,
): Promise<void> {
  const paths = getMaterialLibPaths(context);
  if (paths.includes(dirPath)) return; // 已存在
  paths.push(dirPath);
  await setMaterialLibPaths(context, paths);
}

/** 移除手动素材库路径 */
export async function removeManualLib(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  dirPath: string,
): Promise<void> {
  const paths = getMaterialLibPaths(context);
  await setMaterialLibPaths(context, paths.filter(p => p !== dirPath));
}

/** 扫描所有手动素材库 */
export function scanManualLibs(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): MaterialLib[] {
  const paths = getMaterialLibPaths(context);
  return paths.map(dirPath => {
    const images = scanImagesRecursive(dirPath);
    return {
      name: path.basename(dirPath),
      path: dirPath,
      images: [],       // 由调用方填充 webview URI
      imagePaths: images,
      isAuto: false,
    };
  });
}

// ─── 汇总 ───

/** 获取全部素材库（自动 + 手动），填充 images 为 webview URI */
export function getAllLibs(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  currentMdPath: string | null,
  webview: vscode.Webview,
): MaterialLib[] {
  const libs: MaterialLib[] = [];

  // 自动素材库
  if (currentMdPath) {
    const wsRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;
    if (wsRoot) {
      const autoLibs = buildAutoLibs(currentMdPath, wsRoot);
      for (const lib of autoLibs) {
        lib.images = lib.imagePaths.map(p => webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.file(p)).toString());
      }
      libs.push(...autoLibs);
    }
  }

  // 手动素材库
  const manualLibs = scanManualLibs(context);
  for (const lib of manualLibs) {
    lib.images = lib.imagePaths.map(p => webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.file(p)).toString());
  }
  libs.push(...manualLibs);

  return libs;
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 侧栏 WebviewViewProvider（spec §8）。
 * 负责 Webview 生命周期、CSP、postMessage 双向通信。
 * M4：素材库管理、插入引用。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as crypto from 'node:crypto';
import * as path from 'node:path';
import { getAppConfig, getConfig, updateConfig, setApiKey } from './config';
import { AppConfig, MdInfo, MaterialLib, ExtMessage, WebviewMessage } from './shared';
import { getAllLibs, addManualLib, removeManualLib } from './material-lib';
import type { TaskManager } from './task-manager';

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;
  private _currentMd: MdInfo | null = null;
  private _taskManager: TaskManager;

  constructor(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, taskManager: TaskManager) {
    this.context = context;
    this._taskManager = taskManager;
  }

  private readonly context: vscode.ExtensionContext;

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    this._view = webviewView;
    const extUri = this.context.extensionUri;

    this.updateResourceRoots(webviewView.webview);

    const nonce = crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('base64');
    webviewView.webview.html = this.buildHtml(webviewView.webview, nonce);

    // 双向消息
    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(async (msg: WebviewMessage) => {
      await this.handleMessage(msg, webviewView.webview);
    });

    // 监听活动编辑器变化 → 通知前端
    this.context.subscriptions.push(
      vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor(async (editor) => {
        await this.trackActiveEditor(webviewView.webview, editor);
      }),
    );

    // 初始跟踪当前编辑器
    this.trackActiveEditor(webviewView.webview, vscode.window.activeTextEditor);
  }

  /** 向 Webview 发送消息 */
  postMessage(msg: ExtMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  // ========== 消息处理 ==========

  private async handleMessage(msg: WebviewMessage, webview: vscode.Webview): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init': {
        const config = await getAppConfig(this.context);
        const libs = this.buildLibs(webview);
        this.postMessage({
          type: 'init',
          config,
          currentMd: this._currentMd,
          tasks: [],
          history: [],
          materialLibs: libs,
        });
        this.postMessage({ type: 'taskUpdate', tasks: [] });
        break;
      }
      case 'generate': {
        if (this._currentMd) {
          try {
            const { generateForMarkdown } = await import('./generate');
            const uri = vscode.Uri.file(this._currentMd.path);
            const task = await generateForMarkdown(this.context, uri);
            if (task) {
              this._taskManager.addTask(task);
            }
          } catch (err) {
            const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
            this.postMessage({ type: 'error', message: msg });
          }
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'previewRequest': {
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本中实现');
        break;
      }
      case 'setConfig': {
        if (msg.key === 'apiKey') {
          await setApiKey(this.context.secrets, String(msg.value));
          this.postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', config: { apiKey: '••••••' } as Partial<AppConfig> });
        } else {
          await updateConfig(this.context, msg.key as keyof AppConfig, msg.value);
          const updated = getConfig(this.context);
          this.postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', config: { ...updated, apiKey: '' } as Partial<AppConfig> });
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'openExternalUrl': {
        await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(msg.url));
        break;
      }
      case 'addMaterialLib': {
        const uris = await vscode.window.showOpenDialog({
          canSelectFolders: true,
          canSelectFiles: false,
          canSelectMany: false,
          title: '选择素材库文件夹',
        });
        if (uris && uris.length > 0) {
          await addManualLib(this.context, uris[0].fsPath);
          this.updateResourceRoots(webview);
          this.postMessage({ type: 'materialLibsUpdate', libs: this.buildLibs(webview) });
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'removeMaterialLib': {
        await removeManualLib(this.context, msg.path);
        this.updateResourceRoots(webview);
        this.postMessage({ type: 'materialLibsUpdate', libs: this.buildLibs(webview) });
        break;
      }
      case 'openImage': {
        await vscode.commands.executeCommand('vscode.open', vscode.Uri.file(msg.path));
        break;
      }
      case 'insertReference': {
        await this.insertImageRef(msg.path);
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  // ========== 编辑器跟踪 ==========

  private async trackActiveEditor(
    webview: vscode.Webview,
    editor: vscode.TextEditor | undefined,
  ): Promise<void> {
    const doc = editor?.document;
    if (doc && doc.uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      const newMd: MdInfo = {
        path: doc.uri.fsPath,
        fileName: doc.fileName.split(/[/\\]/).pop() ?? doc.fileName,
      };
      if (!this._currentMd || this._currentMd.path !== newMd.path) {
        this._currentMd = newMd;
        this.postMessage({ type: 'currentMdUpdate', md: newMd });
        // MD 变化时刷新素材库
        this.postMessage({ type: 'materialLibsUpdate', libs: this.buildLibs(webview) });
      }
    }
    // 非 MD 不清空 currentMd（spec §8.2）
  }

  // ========== 素材库 ==========

  private buildLibs(webview: vscode.Webview): MaterialLib[] {
    return getAllLibs(this.context, this._currentMd?.path ?? null, webview);
  }

  private updateResourceRoots(webview: vscode.Webview): void {
    const extUri = this.context.extensionUri;
    const folders = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.map(f => f.uri) ?? [];
    const manualPaths = getMaterialLibPaths?.(this.context) ?? [];
    const libRoots = manualPaths.map(p => vscode.Uri.file(p));

    webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [vscode.Uri.joinPath(extUri, 'media'), ...folders, ...libRoots],
    };
  }

  // ========== 插入引用 ==========

  /**
   * 将图片以 Markdown 引用语法插入生效 MD 的光标处（spec §10.3）。
   * 路径取相对 MD 目录的 POSIX 风格相对路径，含空格/括号用 <> 包裹。
   */
  private async insertImageRef(imageAbsPath: string): Promise<void> {
    if (!this._currentMd) {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage('没有生效的 Markdown 文件');
      return;
    }

    // 仅当活动编辑器正是生效 MD 时才插入
    const activeEditor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
    if (!activeEditor) {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage('没有活动的编辑器');
      return;
    }
    const activePath = activeEditor.document.uri.fsPath;
    if (activePath !== this._currentMd.path) {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage('当前活动编辑器不是生效的 Markdown 文件，请先切换到对应文件');
      return;
    }

    const mdDir = path.dirname(this._currentMd.path);

    // 跨盘符检测
    const imgParsed = path.parse(imageAbsPath);
    const mdParsed = path.parse(mdDir);
    if (imgParsed.root !== mdParsed.root) {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage('图片与 Markdown 文件不在同一盘符，无法生成相对路径');
      return;
    }

    // POSIX 风格相对路径
    let rel = path.relative(mdDir, imageAbsPath).split(path.sep).join('/');

    // 非 .. 开头加 ./ 前缀
    if (!rel.startsWith('..')) {
      rel = `./${rel}`;
    }

    // 空格或半角括号 → <> 包裹
    const needsBracket = /[ ()]/.test(rel);
    const refPath = needsBracket ? `<${rel}>` : rel;

    // alt 文本：文件名去扩展名
    const fileName = path.basename(imageAbsPath);
    const alt = fileName.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');

    // 插入
    const ref = `![${alt}](${refPath})`;
    await activeEditor.edit((editBuilder) => {
      editBuilder.insert(activeEditor.selection.active, ref);
    });
  }

  // ========== HTML 构造 ==========

  private buildHtml(webview: vscode.Webview, nonce: string): string {
    const sidebarUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const styleUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );
    const cspSource = webview.cspSource;

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 img-src ${cspSource} data: https:;
                 style-src ${cspSource} 'unsafe-inline';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}';
                 font-src ${cspSource};">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${styleUri}">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

```
</details>

> 2. Left click on thumbnail → openImage message
> 3. Right click on thumbnail → insertReference message
> 
> Let me also think about the WebviewMessage type. Looking at it:
> 
> ```ts
> export type WebviewMessage =
>   | { type: 'init' }
>   | { type: 'generate' }
>   | { type: 'previewRequest' }
>   | { type: 'setConfig'; key: string; value: unknown }
>   | { type: 'addMaterialLib' }
>   | { type: 'removeMaterialLib'; path: string }

<details>

```typescript
/**
 * 工作台标签页（spec §8.3）。
 * 上部：素材库区（自动 + 手动）；底部：控件行 + 生成行 + 状态行。
 * M4：素材库缩略图 + 右键插入引用。
 */

import React from 'react';
import { AppConfig, MdInfo, MaterialLib } from '../shared';

const vscodeApi = (window as any).acquireVsCodeApi?.() ?? { postMessage: (_m: unknown) => {} };

interface Props {
  config: AppConfig;
  currentMd: MdInfo | null;
  isGenerating: boolean;
  errorMsg: string;
  materialLibs: MaterialLib[];
  onConfigChange: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onGenerate: () => void;
}

function handleRightClick(e: React.MouseEvent, imagePath: string) {
  e.preventDefault();
  vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'insertReference', path: imagePath });
}

function MaterialLibSection({ lib, cols, onRemove }: {
  lib: MaterialLib;
  cols: number;
  onRemove?: () => void;
}): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <div className={`matlib matlib-${lib.isAuto ? 'auto' : 'manual'}`}>
      <div className="matlib-header">
        <span className="matlib-name" title={lib.path}>{lib.name}</span>
        <span className="matlib-count">{lib.images.length} 张</span>
        {onRemove && (
          <button className="matlib-remove-btn" onClick={onRemove} title="移除此素材库">×</button>
        )}
      </div>
      {lib.images.length > 0 ? (
        <div
          className="matlib-grid"
          style={{
            gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)`,
          }}
        >
          {lib.images.map((uri, i) => (
            <div
              key={i}
              className="matlib-thumb"
              onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'openImage', path: lib.imagePaths[i] })}
              onContextMenu={(e) => handleRightClick(e, lib.imagePaths[i])}
            >
              <img src={uri} alt="" loading="lazy" />
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      ) : (
        <p className="matlib-empty">此目录中无图片</p>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

export default function WorkbenchTab(props: Props): React.ReactElement {
  const { config, currentMd, isGenerating, errorMsg, materialLibs, onConfigChange, onGenerate } = props;

  const autoLibs = materialLibs.filter(l => l.isAuto);
  const manualLibs = materialLibs.filter(l => !l.isAuto);

  return (
    <div className="workbench">
      {/* 素材库区 */}
      <div className="material-libs-area">
        {autoLibs.length > 0 && (
          <div className="matlib-section">
            <div className="matlib-section-title">当前路径</div>
            {autoLibs.map(lib => (
              <MaterialLibSection key={lib.path} lib={lib} cols={config.workbenchCols} />
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="matlib-section">
          <div className="matlib-section-title">
            手动素材库
            <button
              className="btn btn-link matlib-add-btn"
              onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'addMaterialLib' })}
            >
              + 添加
            </button>
          </div>
          {manualLibs.map(lib => (
            <MaterialLibSection
              key={lib.path}
              lib={lib}
              cols={config.workbenchCols}
              onRemove={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'removeMaterialLib', path: lib.path })}
            />
          ))}
          {manualLibs.length === 0 && (
            <p className="matlib-empty">暂无手动素材库。点击「+ 添加」选择文件夹。</p>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 控件行 */}
      <div className="controls-row">
        <label className="control-label">
          模型
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.model}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('model', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
            <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
            <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>
            <option value="gpt-image-2-vip">gpt-image-2-vip</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          分辨率
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.imageSize}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('imageSize', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="1K">1K</option>
            <option value="2K">2K</option>
            <option value="4K">4K</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          比例
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.aspectRatio}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('aspectRatio', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="1:1">1:1</option>
            <option value="3:4">3:4</option>
            <option value="16:9">16:9</option>
            <option value="9:16">9:16</option>
            <option value="4:3">4:3</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          并发
          <input
            type="number"
            className="control-number"
            min={1} max={10}
            value={config.concurrency}
            onChange={e => {
              const v = Math.max(1, Math.min(10, parseInt(e.target.value) || 1));
              onConfigChange('concurrency', v);
            }}
          />
        </label>
      </div>

      {/* 生成行 */}
      <div className="generate-row">
        <span className="current-md-name">
          {currentMd ? currentMd.fileName : '未打开 Markdown 文件'}
        </span>
        <button className="btn btn-secondary" onClick={() => {
          vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'previewRequest' });
        }}>
          预览请求
        </button>
        <button
          className="btn btn-primary"
          disabled={isGenerating || !currentMd}
          onClick={onGenerate}
        >
          {isGenerating ? '生成中…' : '生成'}
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* 状态行 */}
      {errorMsg && <div className="status-line error">{errorMsg}</div>}
    </div>
  );
}

```
</details>

/**
 * 工作台标签页（spec §8.3）。
 * 上部素材库区（M4）、底部控件行 + 生成行 + 状态行。
 */

import React from 'react';
import { AppConfig, MdInfo, MaterialLib } from '../shared';

interface Props {
  config: AppConfig;
  currentMd: MdInfo | null;
  isGenerating: boolean;
  errorMsg: string;
  materialLibs: MaterialLib[];
  onConfigChange: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onGenerate: () => void;
}

export default function WorkbenchTab(props: Props): React.ReactElement {
  const { config, currentMd, isGenerating, errorMsg, onConfigChange, onGenerate } = props;

  return (
    <div className="workbench">
      {/* 控件行 */}
      <div className="controls-row">
        <label className="control-label">
          模型
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.model}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('model', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
            <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
            <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>
            <option value="gpt-image-2-vip">gpt-image-2-vip</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          分辨率
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.imageSize}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('imageSize', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="1K">1K</option>
            <option value="2K">2K</option>
            <option value="4K">4K</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          比例
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.aspectRatio}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('aspectRatio', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="1:1">1:1</option>
            <option value="3:4">3:4</option>
            <option value="16:9">16:9</option>
            <option value="9:16">9:16</option>
            <option value="4:3">4:3</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          并发
          <input
            type="number"
            className="control-number"
            min={1} max={10}
            value={config.concurrency}
            onChange={e => {
              const v = Math.max(1, Math.min(10, parseInt(e.target.value) || 1));
              onConfigChange('concurrency', v);
            }}
          />
        </label>
      </div>

      {/* 生成行 */}
      <div className="generate-row">
        <span className="current-md-name">
          {currentMd ? currentMd.fileName : '未打开 Markdown 文件'}
        </span>
        <button className="btn btn-secondary" onClick={() => {
          (window as any).acquireVsCodeApi?.()?.postMessage({ type: 'previewRequest' });
        }}>
          预览请求
        </button>
        <button
          className="btn btn-primary"
          disabled={isGenerating || !currentMd}
          onClick={onGenerate}
        >
          {isGenerating ? '生成中…' : '生成'}
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* 状态行 */}
      {errorMsg && <div className="status-line error">{errorMsg}</div>}
    </div>
  );
}

/**
 * 工作台标签页（spec §8.3）。
 * 上部：素材库区（自动 + 手动）；底部：控件行 + 生成行 + 状态行。
 * M4：素材库缩略图 + 右键插入引用。
 */

import React from 'react';
import { AppConfig, MdInfo, MaterialLib } from '../shared';

const vscodeApi = (window as any).acquireVsCodeApi?.() ?? { postMessage: (_m: unknown) => {} };

interface Props {
  config: AppConfig;
  currentMd: MdInfo | null;
  isGenerating: boolean;
  errorMsg: string;
  materialLibs: MaterialLib[];
  onConfigChange: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onGenerate: () => void;
}

function handleRightClick(e: React.MouseEvent, imagePath: string) {
  e.preventDefault();
  vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'insertReference', path: imagePath });
}

function MaterialLibSection({ lib, cols, onRemove }: {
  lib: MaterialLib;
  cols: number;
  onRemove?: () => void;
}): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <div className={`matlib matlib-${lib.isAuto ? 'auto' : 'manual'}`}>
      <div className="matlib-header">
        <span className="matlib-name" title={lib.path}>{lib.name}</span>
        <span className="matlib-count">{lib.images.length} 张</span>
        {onRemove && (
          <button className="matlib-remove-btn" onClick={onRemove} title="移除此素材库">×</button>
        )}
      </div>
      {lib.images.length > 0 ? (
        <div
          className="matlib-grid"
          style={{
            gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)`,
          }}
        >
          {lib.images.map((uri, i) => (
            <div
              key={i}
              className="matlib-thumb"
              onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'openImage', path: lib.imagePaths[i] })}
              onContextMenu={(e) => handleRightClick(e, lib.imagePaths[i])}
            >
              <img src={uri} alt="" loading="lazy" />
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      ) : (
        <p className="matlib-empty">此目录中无图片</p>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

export default function WorkbenchTab(props: Props): React.ReactElement {
  const { config, currentMd, isGenerating, errorMsg, materialLibs, onConfigChange, onGenerate } = props;

  const autoLibs = materialLibs.filter(l => l.isAuto);
  const manualLibs = materialLibs.filter(l => !l.isAuto);

  return (
    <div className="workbench">
      {/* 素材库区 */}
      <div className="material-libs-area">
        {autoLibs.length > 0 && (
          <div className="matlib-section">
            <div className="matlib-section-title">当前路径</div>
            {autoLibs.map(lib => (
              <MaterialLibSection key={lib.path} lib={lib} cols={config.workbenchCols} />
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="matlib-section">
          <div className="matlib-section-title">
            手动素材库
            <button
              className="btn btn-link matlib-add-btn"
              onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'addMaterialLib' })}
            >
              + 添加
            </button>
          </div>
          {manualLibs.map(lib => (
            <MaterialLibSection
              key={lib.path}
              lib={lib}
              cols={config.workbenchCols}
              onRemove={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'removeMaterialLib', path: lib.path })}
            />
          ))}
          {manualLibs.length === 0 && (
            <p className="matlib-empty">暂无手动素材库。点击「+ 添加」选择文件夹。</p>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 控件行 */}
      <div className="controls-row">
        <label className="control-label">
          模型
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.model}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('model', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
            <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
            <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>
            <option value="gpt-image-2-vip">gpt-image-2-vip</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          分辨率
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.imageSize}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('imageSize', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="1K">1K</option>
            <option value="2K">2K</option>
            <option value="4K">4K</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          比例
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.aspectRatio}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('aspectRatio', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="1:1">1:1</option>
            <option value="3:4">3:4</option>
            <option value="16:9">16:9</option>
            <option value="9:16">9:16</option>
            <option value="4:3">4:3</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          并发
          <input
            type="number"
            className="control-number"
            min={1} max={10}
            value={config.concurrency}
            onChange={e => {
              const v = Math.max(1, Math.min(10, parseInt(e.target.value) || 1));
              onConfigChange('concurrency', v);
            }}
          />
        </label>
      </div>

      {/* 生成行 */}
      <div className="generate-row">
        <span className="current-md-name">
          {currentMd ? currentMd.fileName : '未打开 Markdown 文件'}
        </span>
        <button className="btn btn-secondary" onClick={() => {
          vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'previewRequest' });
        }}>

        <button
          className="btn btn-primary"

          onClick={onGenerate}
        >
          {isGenerating ? '生成中…' : '生成'}
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* 状态行 */}
      {errorMsg && <div className="status-line error">{errorMsg}</div>}
    </div>
  );
}

### 🤖 Assistant: *最终编译验证。*

`07:22:44`

<details>
<summary>Thinking...</summary>

> Let me also verify that the markdown parser handles `<>` wrapped paths in references correctly. Looking at the existing code:
> 
> ```ts
> const imgRegex = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\((<[^>]*>|[^)]*)\)/g;
> ```
> 
> This regex matches:
> - `![alt](<path>)` - captures path with angle brackets
> - `![alt](path)` - captures path without
> 
> Then it strips the angle brackets:
> ```ts
> if (rawPath.startsWith('<') && rawPath.endsWith('>')) {
>   path = rawPath.slice(1, -1).trim();
> } else {
>   path = rawPath.trim();
> }
> ```
> 
> The `<>` can wrap paths with spaces or parentheses. But what about a path like `./my image.png`? The path contains a space but no brackets, so it matches as `[^)]*` which would just capture `./my image.png` — this should work fine since the regex isn't character-class limited.
> 
> But what about a path like `./image(1).png`? The `[^)]*` won't match because there's a `)` inside. This is exactly why `<>` wrapping exists. The parser should handle it correctly: `![alt](<./image(1).png>)` → the regex captures `<./image(1).png>` in the `(<[^>]*>)` alternative.
> 
> Good, the existing parser already handles this. The insertReference function in sidebar-provider generates `<>` wrapping for paths with spaces or parentheses, which is exactly what the parser expects. The compatibility is already there.
> 
> Let me run the final verify.
</details>

> 最终编译验证。

<details>

```typescript
/**
 * 生成流程编排（spec §7）。
 * M3：改为 replyType:async 提交，返回 Task 由 TaskManager 接管轮询。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'node:path';
import * as fs from 'node:fs/promises';
import { parseReferences, validateNotEmpty } from './markdown-parser';
import { submitGenerate } from './api';
import { mimeFromPath } from './image-utils';
import { getConfig, ensureApiKey } from './config';
import type { Task, Job } from './shared';

// ─── 工具 ───

/** 格式化时间戳：yyMMddHHmmSS */
function timestamp(): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const y = String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const M = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const d = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const h = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const m = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const s = String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${y}${M}${d}${h}${m}${s}`;
}

/** 已有的同秒任务文件夹数 → seq */
async function nextSeq(parentDir: string, ts: string): Promise<number> {
  let seq = 1;
  const prefix = `task-${ts}-`;
  try {
    const entries = await fs.readdir(parentDir);
    const existing = entries.filter((n) => n.startsWith(prefix));
    const nums = existing
      .map((n) => parseInt(n.slice(prefix.length), 10))
      .filter((n) => !isNaN(n));
    if (nums.length > 0) {
      seq = Math.max(...nums) + 1;
    }
  } catch {
    // 目录不存在或无权限，seq 从 1 开始
  }
  return seq;
}

/** 读取 Markdown 文件所在目录同级参考图，转为 data URI */
async function readReferenceImages(
  mdDir: string,
  refPaths: string[],
): Promise<string[]> {
  const errors: string[] = [];
  const images: string[] = [];

  for (const refPath of refPaths) {
    const resolved = path.resolve(mdDir, refPath);
    try {
      const buffer = await fs.readFile(resolved);
      const mime = mimeFromPath(resolved);
      const b64 = buffer.toString('base64');
      images.push(`data:${mime};base64,${b64}`);
    } catch {
      errors.push(refPath);
    }
  }

  if (errors.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
  }

  return images;
}

// ─── 主流程 ───

/**
 * 对单个 Markdown 文件执行异步生成提交。
 * 返回待注册到 TaskManager 的 Task 对象。
 * 若全部提交失败返回 null（已内部清理）。
 */
export async function generateForMarkdown(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
): Promise<Task | null> {
  // 1. 校验 apiKey
  const apiKey = await ensureApiKey(context);

  // 2. 读取 Markdown 内容
  const mdContent = Buffer.from(await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri)).toString('utf-8');
  validateNotEmpty(mdContent);

  // 3. 解析参考图
  const { references, replacedText } = parseReferences(mdContent);

  // 4. 读取参考图并编码
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const refPaths = references.map((r) => r.path);
  const images = await readReferenceImages(mdDir, refPaths);

  // 5. 获取配置
  const config = getConfig(context);
  const mdFileName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

  // 6. 创建任务文件夹
  const ts = timestamp();
  const seq = await nextSeq(mdDir, ts);
  const folderName = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
  const folderPath = path.join(mdDir, folderName);
  await fs.mkdir(folderPath, { recursive: true });

  // 7. 异步并发提交 N 个 job
  const N = config.concurrency;
  const jobs: Job[] = [];
  const submitPromises = Array.from({ length: N }, () =>
    submitGenerate(config.baseUrl, apiKey, {
      model: config.model,
      prompt: replacedText,
      images: images.length > 0 ? images : undefined,
      aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
      imageSize: config.imageSize,
      replyType: 'async',
    }).then(
      (resp) => ({ ok: true as const, response: resp }),
      (err) => ({ ok: false as const, error: String(err) }),
    ),
  );

  const settled = await Promise.all(submitPromises);
  for (const r of settled) {
    if (r.ok && r.response.status === 'running') {
      jobs.push({
        id: r.response.id,
        status: 'running',
        progress: r.response.progress ?? 0,
      });
    } else if (r.ok) {
      // 直接返回了终态
      jobs.push({
        id: r.response.id,
        status: r.response.status as Job['status'],
        error: r.response.error,
      });
    } else {
      jobs.push({ status: 'failed', error: r.error });
    }
  }

  // 8. 全部提交失败 → 清理并返回 null
  const allFailed = jobs.every((j) => j.status === 'failed' || j.status === 'violation');
  if (allFailed) {
    const errors = [...new Set(jobs.map((j) => j.error!).filter(Boolean))];
    try { await fs.rmdir(folderPath); } catch { /* 忽略 */ }
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`所有请求提交失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
    return null;
  }

  // 9. 构建 Task 对象
  const task: Task = {
    folderName,
    folderPath,
    mdFileName,
    model: config.model,
    baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
    jobs,
    startedAt: Date.now(),
    sessionStartedAt: Date.now(),
    status: 'active',
  };

  return task;
}

```
</details>

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612144918/src/api.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * Grsai API 调用层（spec §6）。
 * 包含请求体构造、模型系列区分、响应校验、超时处理。
 */

import type { GenerateResponse, ModelFamily } from './shared';

// ─── 模型系列判定 ───

export function getModelFamily(model: string): ModelFamily {
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') return 'gpt-image-2-vip';
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2') return 'gpt-image-2';
  // nano-banana, nano-banana-fast, nano-banana-2, nano-banana-2-cl,
  // nano-banana-pro, nano-banana-pro-cl, nano-banana-pro-vip 等均归此类
  return 'nano-banana';
}

// ─── gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算表 ───

interface PixelEntry {
  width: number;
  height: number;
}

/** 比例 + 分辨率 → 像素值查表 */
const VIP_PIXEL_TABLE: Record<string, Record<string, PixelEntry>> = {
  '1:1':  { '1K': { width: 1024, height: 1024 }, '2K': { width: 2048, height: 2048 }, '4K': { width: 2880, height: 2880 } },
  '3:4':  { '1K': { width: 864,  height: 1152  }, '2K': { width: 1728, height: 2304  }, '4K': { width: 2448, height: 3264 } },
  '4:3':  { '1K': { width: 1152, height: 864   }, '2K': { width: 2304, height: 1728  }, '4K': { width: 3264, height: 2448 } },
  '16:9': { '1K': { width: 1280, height: 720   }, '2K': { width: 2560, height: 1440  }, '4K': { width: 3840, height: 2160 } },
  '9:16': { '1K': { width: 720,  height: 1280  }, '2K': { width: 1440, height: 2560  }, '4K': { width: 2160, height: 3840 } },
};

/** gpt-image-2-vip：比例 + 分辨率 → 像素值字符串（如 "864x1152"） */
export function vipPixelSize(aspectRatio: string, imageSize: string): string {
  const entry = VIP_PIXEL_TABLE[aspectRatio]?.[imageSize];
  if (!entry) {
    throw new Error(`不支持的 vip 像素组合: ${aspectRatio} + ${imageSize}`);
  }
  return `${entry.width}x${entry.height}`;
}

// ─── 请求体构造 ───

export interface GenerateParams {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images?: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  replyType: 'json' | 'async';
}

/** 构造 POST /v1/api/generate 请求体，按模型系列区分尺寸字段 */
export function buildRequestBody(params: GenerateParams): Record<string, unknown> {
  const family = getModelFamily(params.model);
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: params.model,
    prompt: params.prompt,
    images: params.images ?? [],
    replyType: params.replyType,
  };

  switch (family) {
    case 'nano-banana':
      body.aspectRatio = params.aspectRatio;
      body.imageSize = params.imageSize;
      break;
    case 'gpt-image-2':
      body.aspectRatio = params.aspectRatio;
      break;
    case 'gpt-image-2-vip':
      body.aspectRatio = vipPixelSize(params.aspectRatio, params.imageSize);
      break;
  }

  return body;
}

// ─── 响应校验 ───
```
</details>

````typescript
/**
 * 预览请求（spec §9）。
 * 对目标 MD 走与真实提交完全一致的解析与请求体构造，不调 API，
 * 结果以临时 Markdown 文档展示四段内容。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'node:path';
import { parseReferences, validateNotEmpty } from './markdown-parser';
import { buildRequestBody } from './api';
import { readReferenceImages } from './generate';
import { getConfig } from './config';

export async function previewForMarkdown(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
): Promise<void> {
  // 1. 读取并校验 Markdown（与 generate 一致）
  const mdContent = Buffer.from(await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri)).toString('utf-8');
  validateNotEmpty(mdContent);

  // 2. 解析参考图（与 generate 一致）
  const { references, replacedText } = parseReferences(mdContent);

  // 3. 编码参考图（与 generate 一致）
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const refPaths = references.map(r => r.path);
  const images = await readReferenceImages(mdDir, refPaths);

  // 4. 获取配置（与 generate 一致）
  const config = getConfig(context);

  // 5. 构造请求体（与 generate 一致的参数，使用 replyType:"json" 展示）
  const body = buildRequestBody({
    model: config.model,
    prompt: replacedText,
    images: images.length > 0 ? images : undefined,
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
    replyType: 'async',
  });

  // 6. 剔除 prompt 与 images 字段后的请求参数 JSON
  const { prompt: _p, images: _imgs, ...stripped } = body;

  // 7. 参考图概览
  let refOverview: string;
  if (images.length > 0) {
    refOverview = images
      .map((dataUri, i) => {
        const head = dataUri.length > 48 ? `${dataUri.slice(0, 48)}…` : dataUri;
        return `image${i + 1}: ${head}（${dataUri.length} 字符）`;
      })
      .join('\n');
  } else {
    refOverview = '无参考图';
  }

  // 8. 组装预览文档
  const endpoint = `POST ${config.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`;
  const docContent = [
    '# 预览请求',
    '',
    '## 1. 最终提示词',
    '',
    replacedText || '(空)',
    '',
    '## 2. 请求地址',
    '',
    endpoint,
    '',
    '## 3. 请求参数（已剔除 prompt 与 images 字段）',
    '',
    '```json',
    JSON.stringify(stripped, null, 2),
    '```',
    '',
    '## 4. 参考图概览',
    '',
    refOverview,
    '',
  ].join('\n');

  // 9. 以临时文档打开
  const doc = await vscode.workspace.openTextDocument({
    content: docContent,
    language: 'markdown',
  });
  await vscode.window.showTextDocument(doc);
}

````
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * image-flow 扩展入口（spec §3）。
 * M1：注册命令，对接生成流程。
 * M2：侧栏 Provider 使用 React Webview。
 * M3：TaskManager 异步轮询 + 持久化。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { generateForMarkdown } from './generate';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebar-provider';
import { TaskManager } from './task-manager';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  // ─── 任务管理器（异步轮询 + 持久化） ───

  const taskManager = new TaskManager(context);

  // ─── 命令：生成 AI 图片 ───

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      try {
        const targetUri = uri ?? vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
        if (!targetUri) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
          return;
        }
        if (!targetUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('仅支持 Markdown (.md) 文件');
          return;
        }

        const task = await generateForMarkdown(context, targetUri);
        if (task) {
          taskManager.addTask(task);
        }
      } catch (err) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
      }
    }),
  );

  // ─── 命令：预览请求（M5 实现，M1 占位） ───

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async () => {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本中实现');
    }),
  );

  // ─── 侧栏 Provider ───

  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context, taskManager);
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
  );

  taskManager.setSidebar(sidebarProvider);

  // ─── 重启续拉 ───

  taskManager.resume().catch(() => {});
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // 定时器随进程销毁自动清除；globalState 持久化由 TaskManager 在状态变更时即时落盘
}

```
</details>

```typescript
export async function generateForMarkdown(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
): Promise<Task | null> {
  // 1. 校验 apiKey
  const apiKey = await ensureApiKey(context);

  // 2. 读取 Markdown 内容
  const mdContent = Buffer.from(await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri)).toString('utf-8');
  validateNotEmpty(mdContent);

  // 3. 解析参考图
  const { references, replacedText } = parseReferences(mdContent);

  // 4. 读取参考图并编码
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const refPaths = references.map((r) => r.path);
  const images = await readReferenceImages(mdDir, refPaths);

  // 5. 获取配置
  const config = getConfig(context);
  const mdFileName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

  // 6. 创建任务文件夹
  const ts = timestamp();
  const seq = await nextSeq(mdDir, ts);
  const folderName = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
  const folderPath = path.join(mdDir, folderName);
  await fs.mkdir(folderPath, { recursive: true });

  // 7. 异步并发提交 N 个 job
  const N = config.concurrency;
  const jobs: Job[] = [];
  const submitPromises = Array.from({ length: N }, () =>
    submitGenerate(config.baseUrl, apiKey, {
      model: config.model,
      prompt: replacedText,
      images: images.length > 0 ? images : undefined,
      aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
      imageSize: config.imageSize,
```
</details>

#### 👀 Read `preview.ts`
