```typescript
/**
 * 工作台标签页（spec §8.3）。
 * 上部：素材库区（自动 + 手动）；底部：控件行 + 生成行 + 状态行。
 * M4：素材库缩略图 + 右键插入引用。
 */

import React from 'react';
import { AppConfig, MdInfo, MaterialLib } from '../shared';

const vscodeApi = acquireVsCodeApi?.() ?? { postMessage: (_m: unknown) => {} };

interface Props {
  config: AppConfig;
  currentMd: MdInfo | null;
  isGenerating: boolean;
  errorMsg: string;
  materialLibs: MaterialLib[];
  onConfigChange: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onGenerate: () => void;
}

function handleRightClick(e: React.MouseEvent, imagePath: string) {
  e.preventDefault();
  vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'insertReference', path: imagePath });
}

function MaterialLibSection({ lib, cols, onRemove }: {
  lib: MaterialLib;
  cols: number;
  onRemove?: () => void;
}): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <div className={`matlib matlib-${lib.isAuto ? 'auto' : 'manual'}`}>
      <div className="matlib-header">
        <span className="matlib-name" title={lib.path}>{lib.name}</span>
        <span className="matlib-count">{lib.images.length} 张</span>
        {onRemove && (
          <button className="matlib-remove-btn" onClick={onRemove} title="移除此素材库">×</button>
        )}
      </div>
      {lib.images.length > 0 ? (
        <div
          className="matlib-grid"
          style={{
            gridTemplateColumns: `repeat(${cols}, 1fr)`,
          }}
        >
          {lib.images.map((uri, i) => (
            <div
              key={i}
              className="matlib-thumb"
              onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'openImage', path: lib.imagePaths[i] })}
              onContextMenu={(e) => handleRightClick(e, lib.imagePaths[i])}
            >
              <img src={uri} alt="" loading="lazy" />
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      ) : (
        <p className="matlib-empty">此目录中无图片</p>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}

export default function WorkbenchTab(props: Props): React.ReactElement {
  const { config, currentMd, isGenerating, errorMsg, materialLibs, onConfigChange, onGenerate } = props;

  const autoLibs = materialLibs.filter(l => l.isAuto);
  const manualLibs = materialLibs.filter(l => !l.isAuto);

  return (
    <div className="workbench">
      {/* 素材库区 */}
      <div className="material-libs-area">
        {autoLibs.length > 0 && (
          <div className="matlib-section">
            <div className="matlib-section-title">当前路径</div>
            {autoLibs.map(lib => (
              <MaterialLibSection key={lib.path} lib={lib} cols={config.workbenchCols} />
            ))}
          </div>
        )}

        <div className="matlib-section">
          <div className="matlib-section-title">
            手动素材库
            <button
              className="btn btn-link matlib-add-btn"
              onClick={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'addMaterialLib' })}
            >
              + 添加
            </button>
          </div>
          {manualLibs.map(lib => (
            <MaterialLibSection
              key={lib.path}
              lib={lib}
              cols={config.workbenchCols}
              onRemove={() => vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'removeMaterialLib', path: lib.path })}
            />
          ))}
          {manualLibs.length === 0 && (
            <p className="matlib-empty">暂无手动素材库。点击「+ 添加」选择文件夹。</p>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 控件行 */}
      <div className="controls-row">
        <label className="control-label">
          模型
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.model}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('model', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
            <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
            <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>
            <option value="gpt-image-2-vip">gpt-image-2-vip</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          分辨率
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.imageSize}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('imageSize', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="1K">1K</option>
            <option value="2K">2K</option>
            <option value="4K">4K</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          比例
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.aspectRatio}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('aspectRatio', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="1:1">1:1</option>
            <option value="3:4">3:4</option>
            <option value="16:9">16:9</option>
            <option value="9:16">9:16</option>
            <option value="4:3">4:3</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          并发
          <input
            type="number"
            className="control-number"
            min={1} max={10}
            value={config.concurrency}
            onChange={e => {
              const v = Math.max(1, Math.min(10, parseInt(e.target.value) || 1));
              onConfigChange('concurrency', v);
            }}
          />
        </label>
      </div>

      {/* 生成行 */}
      <div className="generate-row">
        <span className="current-md-name">
          {currentMd ? currentMd.fileName : '未打开 Markdown 文件'}
        </span>
        <button className="btn btn-secondary" onClick={() => {
          vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'previewRequest' });
        }}>
          预览请求
        </button>
        <button
          className="btn btn-primary"
          disabled={isGenerating || !currentMd}
          onClick={onGenerate}
        >
          {isGenerating ? '生成中…' : '生成'}
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* 状态行 */}
      {errorMsg && <div className="status-line error">{errorMsg}</div>}
    </div>
  );
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * image-flow 扩展入口（spec §3）。
 * M1：注册命令，对接生成流程。
 * M2：侧栏 Provider 使用 React Webview。
 * M3：TaskManager 异步轮询 + 持久化。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { generateForMarkdown } from './generate';
import { previewForMarkdown } from './preview';
import { SidebarProvider } from './sidebar-provider';
import { TaskManager } from './task-manager';
import { seedModelInjections } from './prompt';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  // ─── 首次激活：种入模型注入种子 ───

  seedModelInjections(context).catch(() => {});

  // ─── 任务管理器（异步轮询 + 持久化） ───

  const taskManager = new TaskManager(context);

  // ─── 命令：生成 AI 图片 ───

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      try {
        const targetUri = uri ?? vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
        if (!targetUri) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
          return;
        }
        if (!targetUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('仅支持 Markdown (.md) 文件');
          return;
        }

        await generateForMarkdown(context, targetUri, taskManager);
      } catch (err) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
      }
    }),
  );

  // ─── 命令：预览请求 ───

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      try {
        const targetUri = uri ?? vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
        if (!targetUri) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
          return;
        }
        if (!targetUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('仅支持 Markdown (.md) 文件');
          return;
        }
        await previewForMarkdown(context, targetUri);
      } catch (err) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`预览失败：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
      }
    }),
  );

  // ─── 侧栏 Provider ───

  const sidebarProvider = new SidebarProvider(context, taskManager);
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
  );

  taskManager.setSidebar(sidebarProvider);

  // ─── 重启续拉 ───

  taskManager.resume().catch(() => {});
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // 定时器随进程销毁自动清除；globalState 持久化由 TaskManager 在状态变更时即时落盘
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 素材库扫描与管理（spec §10）。
 * 自动素材库：MD 路径逐层向上、每层直接图片（不递归）。
 * 手动素材库：递归扫描，深度上限 3、条目上限 500。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'node:path';
import * as fs from 'node:fs';
import { MaterialLib } from './shared';
import { isImageFile } from './image-utils';
import { getMaterialLibPaths, setMaterialLibPaths } from './config';

const MAX_DEPTH = 3;
const MAX_ENTRIES = 500;
const AUTO_LIB_MAX_DEPTH = 10; // 防止异常路径无限循环

// ─── 通用扫描 ───

/** 扫描单个目录中的直接图片（非递归），返回绝对路径列表 */
function scanImagesFlat(dir: string): string[] {
  try {
    return fs.readdirSync(dir)
      .map(f => path.join(dir, f))
      .filter(f => fs.statSync(f).isFile() && isImageFile(f))
      .sort();
  } catch {
    return [];
  }
}

/** 递归扫描图片，深度上限 3、条目上限 500，返回绝对路径列表 */
function scanImagesRecursive(root: string): string[] {
  const results: string[] = [];
  const stack: Array<{ dir: string; depth: number }> = [{ dir: root, depth: 0 }];

  while (stack.length > 0 && results.length < MAX_ENTRIES) {
    const { dir, depth } = stack.pop()!;
    if (depth >= MAX_DEPTH) continue;

    let entries: fs.Dirent[];
    try {
      entries = fs.readdirSync(dir, { withFileTypes: true });
    } catch {
      continue;
    }

    for (const entry of entries) {
      if (results.length >= MAX_ENTRIES) break;
      const fullPath = path.join(dir, entry.name);
      if (entry.isDirectory()) {
        stack.push({ dir: fullPath, depth: depth + 1 });
      } else if (entry.isFile() && isImageFile(entry.name)) {
        results.push(fullPath);
      }
    }
  }

  return results.sort();
}

// ─── 自动素材库 ───

/**
 * 根据生效 MD 路径构建自动素材库列表。
 * 从工作区根下一层到 MD 所在目录，每层取直接图片（不递归）。
 */
export function buildAutoLibs(
  currentMdPath: string,
  workspaceRoot: string,
): MaterialLib[] {
  const libs: MaterialLib[] = [];
  const normalizedMd = path.resolve(currentMdPath);
  const normalizedRoot = path.resolve(workspaceRoot);

  // MD 不在工作区内
  if (!normalizedMd.startsWith(normalizedRoot + path.sep) && normalizedMd !== normalizedRoot) {
    return [];
  }

  // 从 MD 所在目录向上，到工作区根下一层为止
  let current = path.dirname(normalizedMd);
  let depth = 0;

  while (current.startsWith(normalizedRoot + path.sep) && depth < AUTO_LIB_MAX_DEPTH) {
    depth++;
    // 不含工作区根那层
    if (current === normalizedRoot) break;

    const images = scanImagesFlat(current);
    if (images.length > 0) {
      // 库名：工作区根到该目录的相对路径
      const relDir = path.relative(normalizedRoot, current) || path.basename(current);
      libs.push({
        name: relDir,
        path: current,
        images: [],      // 由调用方填充 webview URI
        imagePaths: images,
        isAuto: true,
      });
    }

    current = path.dirname(current);
  }

  return libs;
}

// ─── 手动素材库 ───

/** 添加手动素材库路径（去重） */
export async function addManualLib(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  dirPath: string,
): Promise<void> {
  const paths = getMaterialLibPaths(context);
  if (paths.includes(dirPath)) return; // 已存在
  paths.push(dirPath);
  await setMaterialLibPaths(context, paths);
}

/** 移除手动素材库路径 */
export async function removeManualLib(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  dirPath: string,
): Promise<void> {
  const paths = getMaterialLibPaths(context);
  await setMaterialLibPaths(context, paths.filter(p => p !== dirPath));
}

/** 扫描所有手动素材库 */
export function scanManualLibs(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): MaterialLib[] {
  const paths = getMaterialLibPaths(context);
  return paths.map(dirPath => {
    const images = scanImagesRecursive(dirPath);
    return {
      name: path.basename(dirPath),
      path: dirPath,
      images: [],       // 由调用方填充 webview URI
      imagePaths: images,
      isAuto: false,
    };
  });
}

// ─── 汇总 ───

/** 获取全部素材库（自动 + 手动），填充 images 为 webview URI */
export function getAllLibs(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  currentMdPath: string | null,
  webview: vscode.Webview,
): MaterialLib[] {
  const libs: MaterialLib[] = [];

  // 自动素材库
  if (currentMdPath) {
    const wsRoot = vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.[0]?.uri.fsPath;
    if (wsRoot) {
      const autoLibs = buildAutoLibs(currentMdPath, wsRoot);
      for (const lib of autoLibs) {
        lib.images = lib.imagePaths.map(p => webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.file(p)).toString());
      }
      libs.push(...autoLibs);
    }
  }

  // 手动素材库
  const manualLibs = scanManualLibs(context);
  for (const lib of manualLibs) {
    lib.images = lib.imagePaths.map(p => webview.asWebviewUri(vscode.Uri.file(p)).toString());
  }
  libs.push(...manualLibs);

  return libs;
}

```
</details>

Yes, because `launchSubmissions` fires the async `submitGenerateWithRetry(...)` — the job stays as 'submitting' until the promise resolves. If all retries fail, the `.catch()` marks it as 'failed'. ✓

> 4. **Potential issue: The `resume` method calls `cleanupEmptyFolder` but `change` is not set to true when cleaning** — this means tasks that get cleaned up (empty folders) won't be persisted. But since the task was NOT pushed to this.tasks, there's nothing to persist for it. The stored copy may still have the old record. Let me check if `persist()` is called before checking for cleanup...
> 
> Looking at resume():
> ```typescript
> for (const task of stored) {
>   // mark stalled jobs as failed

>   if (hasActive) {
>     this.tasks.push(task);
>     changed = true;
>   } else {
>     cleanupEmptyFolder(task.folderPath);
>   }
> }
> if (changed) {
>   await this.persist();
> }
> ```
> 
> If a task is NOT hasActive, `changed` is never set for it. But the jobs were marked as 'failed' which means `changed = true` was set earlier. So persist is called because of the other changed flags. However, this doesn't remove the task from stored data. The stored data still has this task even though the folder was cleaned up.
> 
> Then on the NEXT resume, the stored task would be loaded again. Its jobs are all 'failed' (already marked), hasActive would be false again, and cleanupEmptyFolder is called again (no-op since folder doesn't exist).
> 
> This isn't a critical bug — it just means the stored data accumulates stale entries. A small optimization: mark `changed = true` when the task is cleaned up and has its stub persisted (or filtered out).

> ```typescript

>   await saveTasks(this.context, this.tasks);
> }
> ```
> 
> So `saveTasks` saves `this.tasks` which only contains ACTIVE tasks (those that were `push`ed). The stale task (with all jobs failed) was never added to `this.tasks`, so it stays in `globalState` even after persist. This means on the next resume, it'll be loaded again from globalState.
> 
> This is a minor issue — the stale entries accumulate but are harmless (they get cleaned up each time). However, it's not ideal.
> 
> Let me fix this: when a task is NOT resumed (all jobs failed and folder cleaned up), remove it from the stored list.
> 
> Actually, looking at the persist function again:
> ```typescript
> private async persist(): Promise<void> {
>   await saveTasks(this.context, this.tasks);
> }
> ```
> 
> And `resume()` loads from `loadTasks(this.context)` into `stored`. If I want to remove stale entries, I need to save a filtered version of `stored` excluding the cleaned-up tasks. But `persist()` only saves `this.tasks`.
> 
> I think the simplest fix is to also persist the `stored` array without the cleaned-up tasks. Or better: just add `changed = true` in the else branch so persisting happens, and the stale entries are removed from globalState by re-persisting `this.tasks`.
> 
> Wait, `persist` saves `this.tasks`, not `stored`. So even if `changed = true`, calling `persist()` would ONLY save `this.tasks` (active tasks), not modify the stale entries in `stored`. Hmm.
> 
> Actually, let me re-read the persist code:
> ```typescript
> private async persist(): Promise<void> {
>   await saveTasks(this.context, this.tasks);
> }
> ```
> 
> `saveTasks` takes the full list and saves it. If `this.tasks` doesn't include the stale task, the stale task is effectively removed from persistence. So when resume runs again, `loadTasks` would return the saved list (without the stale task). The stale task IS removed from persistence — it doesn't accumulate.
> 
> Wait, but what about the `changed` flag for the else branch? If `hasActive` is false for a task and we clean it up, `changed` was already set to true when the stalled jobs were marked as failed. So `persist()` IS called, and it saves `this.tasks` (which doesn't include the stale task). Good — the stale persistence is cleaned up.
> 
> Actually no, `changed` is set to `true` earlier when stalled jobs are marked failed. But `persist()` only saves `this.tasks` (the in-memory list). The `changed` flag just controls whether `persist()` is called at all. Since `this.tasks` doesn't include the cleaned-up task, it won't be in the saved list. ✓
> 
> OK so there's no real bug here. The stale entries are naturally removed because `persist()` saves `this.tasks` which doesn't include cleaned-up tasks. ✓

```typescript
/**
 * Webview 根组件。
 * 三标签页：工作台 / 任务 / 设置。
 * 使用 Radix Tabs，切换保留各页内部状态。
 * M7：生成后自动切到任务标签页。
 */

import React, { useState, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';
import WorkbenchTab from './WorkbenchTab';
import TasksTab from './TasksTab';
import SettingsTab from './SettingsTab';
import { AppConfig, MdInfo, Task, HistoryItem, MaterialLib, ExtMessage, WebviewMessage } from '../shared';

const vscodeApi = acquireVsCodeApi?.() ?? {
  postMessage: (_msg: WebviewMessage) => {},
  getState: () => ({}),
  setState: (_s: unknown) => {},
};

export default function App(): React.ReactElement {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<AppConfig | null>(null);
  const [currentMd, setCurrentMd] = useState<MdInfo | null>(null);
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
  const [history, setHistory] = useState<HistoryItem[]>([]);
  const [materialLibs, setMaterialLibs] = useState<MaterialLib[]>([]);
  const [errorMsg, setErrorMsg] = useState('');
  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);
  const [tabValue, setTabValue] = useState('workbench');

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (ev: MessageEvent<ExtMessage>) => {
      const msg = ev.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'init':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setCurrentMd(msg.currentMd);
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          setMaterialLibs(msg.materialLibs);
          break;
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig(prev => prev ? { ...prev, ...msg.config } : null);
          break;
        case 'taskUpdate':
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          break;
        case 'historyUpdate':
          setHistory(msg.history);
          break;
        case 'currentMdUpdate':
          setCurrentMd(msg.md);
          break;
        case 'error':
          setErrorMsg(msg.message);
          setIsGenerating(false);
          break;
        case 'generationStarted':
          setIsGenerating(true);
          setErrorMsg('');
          break;
        case 'materialLibsUpdate':
          setMaterialLibs(msg.libs);
          break;
        case 'focusTasksTab':
          setTabValue('tasks');
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const sendConfig = useCallback((key: string, value: unknown) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key, value });
  }, []);

  const handleGenerate = useCallback(() => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'generate' });
  }, []);

  if (!config) {
    return <div className="loading">加载中…</div>;
  }

  return (
    <Tabs.Root className="tabs-root" value={tabValue} onValueChange={setTabValue}>
      <Tabs.List className="tabs-list" aria-label="标签页">
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="workbench">工作台</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="tasks">任务</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="settings">设置</Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="workbench" forceMount>
        <WorkbenchTab
          config={config}
          currentMd={currentMd}
          isGenerating={isGenerating}
          errorMsg={errorMsg}
          materialLibs={materialLibs}
          onConfigChange={sendConfig}
          onGenerate={handleGenerate}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="tasks" forceMount>
        <TasksTab
          tasks={tasks}
          history={history}
          tasksCols={config.tasksCols}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="settings" forceMount>
        <SettingsTab
          config={config}
          onConfigChange={sendConfig}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 配置读写（spec §4）。
 * apiKey 走 VS Code Secrets，其余配置走 globalState（patch 语义），
 * 素材库路径走 workspaceState（按工作区隔离）。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { AppConfig, Task } from './shared';

const GLOBAL_KEY = 'image-flow.config';
const MATERIAL_LIBS_KEY = 'image-flow.materialLibs';
const API_KEY_SECRET = 'image-flow.apiKey';
const TASKS_KEY = 'image-flow.tasks';

const DEFAULTS: Omit<AppConfig, 'apiKey'> = {
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
  model: 'nano-banana-2',
  aspectRatio: '3:4',
  imageSize: '1K',
  concurrency: 1,
  workbenchCols: 4,
  tasksCols: 2,
  modelInjections: {},
};

// ========== apiKey（Secrets） ==========

export async function getApiKey(secrets: vscode.SecretStorage): Promise<string> {
  return (await secrets.get(API_KEY_SECRET)) ?? '';
}

export async function setApiKey(secrets: vscode.SecretStorage, key: string): Promise<void> {
  await secrets.store(API_KEY_SECRET, key);
}

// ========== 其余配置（globalState） ==========

/** 读取完整配置快照。apiKey 需调用方从 secrets 填入。 */
export function getConfig(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Omit<AppConfig, 'apiKey'> {
  const stored = context.globalState.get<Partial<AppConfig>>(GLOBAL_KEY);
  return { ...DEFAULTS, ...stored };
}

/** 单字段 patch 写入 globalState，与已有字段合并。 */
export async function updateConfig(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  key: keyof AppConfig,
  value: unknown,
): Promise<void> {
  const current = context.globalState.get<Partial<AppConfig>>(GLOBAL_KEY) ?? {};
  (current as Record<string, unknown>)[key] = value;
  await context.globalState.update(GLOBAL_KEY, current);
}

// ========== 素材库路径（workspaceState） ==========

export function getMaterialLibPaths(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): string[] {
  return context.workspaceState.get<string[]>(MATERIAL_LIBS_KEY) ?? [];
}

export async function setMaterialLibPaths(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  paths: string[],
): Promise<void> {
  await context.workspaceState.update(MATERIAL_LIBS_KEY, paths);
}

// ========== 便捷方法 ==========

/** 拼装完整 AppConfig（含 apiKey）。 */
export async function getAppConfig(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<AppConfig> {
  const cfg = getConfig(context);
  const apiKey = await getApiKey(context.secrets);
  return { ...cfg, apiKey };
}

/** 校验 apiKey 已配置，未配置则弹输入框让用户填写并存入 Secrets。 */
export async function ensureApiKey(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<string> {
  let apiKey = await getApiKey(context.secrets);
  if (!apiKey) {
    apiKey = await vscode.window.showInputBox({
      prompt: '请输入 Grsai API Key（获取：https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys）',
      placeHolder: 'sk-...',
      password: true,
      ignoreFocusOut: true,
    }) ?? '';
    if (apiKey) {
      await setApiKey(context.secrets, apiKey);
    }
  }
  if (!apiKey) {
    throw new Error('API Key 未配置');
  }
  return apiKey;
}

// ========== 任务持久化（globalState） ==========

export function loadTasks(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Task[] {
  return context.globalState.get<Task[]>(TASKS_KEY) ?? [];
}

export async function saveTasks(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, tasks: Task[]): Promise<void> {
  await context.globalState.update(TASKS_KEY, tasks);
}

```

<details>

```typescript
/**
 * 设置标签页（spec §8.5）。
 * API Key / 节点 / 列数 / 模型注入提示词编辑。
 * 所有控件 onChange 即时保存，无保存按钮。
 */

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { AppConfig } from '../shared';

interface Props {
  config: AppConfig;
  onConfigChange: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
}

export default function SettingsTab({ config, onConfigChange }: Props): React.ReactElement {
  // injection 编辑选择的模型（独立于工作台）
  const [injModel, setInjModel] = useState(config.model);

  return (
    <div className="settings">
      {/* API Key */}
      <div className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">API Key</label>
        <div className="setting-row">
          <input
            type="password"
            className="setting-input"
            placeholder="sk-..."
            defaultValue={config.apiKey ? '••••••••' : ''}
            onChange={e => {
              if (e.target.value && e.target.value !== '••••••••') {
                onConfigChange('apiKey', e.target.value);
              }
            }}
          />
          <button
            className="btn btn-link"
            onClick={() => {
              acquireVsCodeApi?.()?.postMessage({
                type: 'openExternalUrl',
                url: 'https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys',
              });
            }}
          >
            获取 API Key →
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 节点 */}
      <div className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">节点</label>
        <select
          className="setting-select"
          value={config.baseUrl}
          onChange={e => onConfigChange('baseUrl', e.target.value)}
        >
          <option value="https://grsai.dakka.com.cn">国内节点</option>
          <option value="https://grsaiapi.com">全球节点</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      {/* 工作台每行张数 */}
      <div className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">工作台每行缩略图数</label>
        <input
          type="number"
          className="setting-number"
          min={1} max={8}
          value={config.workbenchCols}
          onChange={e => {
            const v = Math.max(1, Math.min(8, parseInt(e.target.value) || 1));
            onConfigChange('workbenchCols', v);
          }}
        />
      </div>

      {/* 任务每行张数 */}
      <div className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">任务页每行缩略图数</label>
        <input
          type="number"
          className="setting-number"
          min={1} max={8}
          value={config.tasksCols}
          onChange={e => {
            const v = Math.max(1, Math.min(8, parseInt(e.target.value) || 1));
            onConfigChange('tasksCols', v);
          }}
        />
      </div>

      {/* 模型注入提示词 */}
      <div className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">模型注入提示词</label>
        <select
          className="setting-select"
          value={injModel}
          onChange={e => setInjModel(e.target.value)}
        >
          <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
          <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
          <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>
          <option value="gpt-image-2-vip">gpt-image-2-vip</option>
        </select>
        <textarea
          className="setting-textarea"
          rows={4}
          placeholder="该模型的前置注入提示词（可选）"
          value={config.modelInjections[injModel] ?? ''}
          onChange={e => {
            const updated = { ...config.modelInjections, [injModel]: e.target.value };
            onConfigChange('modelInjections', updated);
          }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

```
</details>

```
    ✔ fetch failed (TypeError) → 瞬时
```

```
import * as esbuild from 'esbuild';

const watch = process.argv.includes('--watch');

/** @type {esbuild.BuildOptions} */
const extConfig = {
  entryPoints: ['src/extension.ts'],
  bundle: true,
  platform: 'node',
  target: 'node18',
  format: 'cjs',
  outfile: 'dist/extension.js',
  external: ['vscode'],
  sourcemap: true,
  minify: false,
};

async function main() {
  if (watch) {
    const ctx = await esbuild.context(extConfig);
    await ctx.watch();
    console.log('[esbuild] watching extension...');
  } else {
    await esbuild.build(extConfig);
    console.log('[esbuild] extension built.');
  }
}

main().catch((e) => {
  console.error(e);
  process.exit(1);
});

```
</details>

> ```typescript
> type ModelFamily = 'nano-banana' | 'gpt-image-2' | 'gpt-image-2-vip';
> 
> function getModelFamily(model: string): ModelFamily {
>   if (model.startsWith('nano-banana')) return 'nano-banana';
>   if (model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') return 'gpt-image-2-vip';
>   if (model === 'gpt-image-2') return 'gpt-image-2';
>   // Default to nano-banana
>   return 'nano-banana';
> }
> ```
> 
> For the request body assembly based on model family:
> - nano-banana: { model, prompt, images, aspectRatio, imageSize, replyType }
> - gpt-image-2: { model, prompt, images, aspectRatio (as ratio string), replyType }
> - gpt-image-2-vip: { model, prompt, images, aspectRatio (as pixel string like "864x1152"), replyType }
> 
> For M1, I'll use `replyType: 'json'` and the response should contain the results directly if successful, or status/running if async is forced by the API.
> 
> Wait, actually looking at the API docs more carefully, for `replyType: 'json'` the response might be immediate (succeeded with results) or it might still return running. Let me handle both cases - if results are present use them, if status is 'running' with an id, poll once or twice synchronously.
> 
> Actually, let me re-read the spec §6:
> - POST returns: id, status (running/succeeded/failed/violation), results, progress, error
> - For async (replyType: 'async'): returns { id, status: running } immediately
> - For sync (replyType: 'json'): probably returns the final result or running...
> 
> The spec says M1 "可先用同步等待实现". So I'll implement a simple polling loop: submit with replyType: 'json', if status is running, wait and poll GET /v1/api/result until done.
> 
> Actually, let me keep it simpler. For the API call:
> 1. POST with replyType: 'json'
> 2. If status is 'succeeded', extract results
> 3. If status is 'running' with an id, poll result endpoint until terminal state
> 4. Handle failed/violation
> 
> For the polling loop in M1 (synchronous wait), I'll do something like:
> - Poll every 2 seconds
> - Timeout after 5 minutes
> - Return when terminal state reached

```typescript
/**
 * 前后端共享的消息协议与类型定义。
 * 此模块同时被扩展主进程与 webview 前端引用，避免协议漂移。
 */

// ─── 配置类型 ───

export interface AppConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

// ─── 任务与 Job 类型 ───

export type JobStatus = 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';

export interface Job {
  id?: string;
  status: JobStatus;
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
  images?: string[];
}

export interface Task {
  folderName: string;
  folderPath: string;
  mdFileName: string;
  model: string;
  jobs: Job[];
  startedAt: number;
  sessionStartedAt: number;
  status: 'active' | 'done';
}

// ─── 素材库类型 ───

export interface MaterialLib {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  images: string[];
  isAuto: boolean;
}

// ─── Markdown 信息 ───

export interface MdInfo {
  path: string;
  fileName: string;
}

// ─── 消息协议 ───

export type ExtMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; config: AppConfig; currentMd: MdInfo | null; tasks: Task[]; history: HistoryItem[]; materialLibs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; config: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: Task[] }
  | { type: 'historyUpdate'; history: HistoryItem[] }
  | { type: 'materialLibsUpdate'; libs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'currentMdUpdate'; md: MdInfo | null }
  | { type: 'error'; message: string }
  | { type: 'generationStarted' };

export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'previewRequest' }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'addMaterialLib' }
  | { type: 'removeMaterialLib'; path: string }
  | { type: 'openImage'; path: string }
  | { type: 'insertReference'; imagePath: string }
  | { type: 'openExternalUrl'; url: string };

// ─── 历史记录 ───

export interface HistoryItem {
  folderName: string;
  folderPath: string;
  imageCount: number;
  images: string[];
}

// ─── Markdown 解析结果 ───

export interface ImageRef {
  alt: string;
  path: string;
  index: number;
}

export interface ParsedResult {
  references: ImageRef[];
  replacedText: string;
}

// ─── API 类型 ───

export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images?: string[];
  aspectRatio?: string;
  imageSize?: string;
  replyType: 'json' | 'async';
}

export interface ApiResultItem {
  url: string;
}

export interface GenerateResponse {
  id?: string;
  status: 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  results?: ApiResultItem[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

export type ModelFamily = 'nano-banana' | 'gpt-image-2' | 'gpt-image-2-vip';

// ─── 预览类型 ───

export interface PreviewContent {
  prompt: string;
  endpoint: string;
  requestParams: string;
  referenceOverview: string;
}

```

```typescript
/**
 * 图片类型白名单与 MIME 工具函数。纯函数，无 VS Code 依赖。
 */

/** 图片扩展名白名单（spec §11） */
const IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST = new Set([
  'png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg',
]);

/** 扩展名 → MIME 类型映射 */
const EXT_TO_MIME: Record<string, string> = {
  png: 'image/png',
  jpg: 'image/jpeg',
  jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
  gif: 'image/gif',
  webp: 'image/webp',
  bmp: 'image/bmp',
  svg: 'image/svg+xml',
};

/** 判断文件名是否为图片 */
export function isImageFile(name: string): boolean {
  const ext = name.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
  return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext);
}

/** 从 URL 提取扩展名并校验白名单，无效则返回空串 */
export function extFromUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const pathname = new URL(url).pathname;
    const ext = pathname.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
    return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext) ? ext : '';
  } catch {
    return '';
  }
}

/** 扩展名 → MIME，不在白名单返回 png 的 MIME */
export function mimeFromExt(ext: string): string {
  return EXT_TO_MIME[ext.toLowerCase()] ?? 'image/png';
}

/** 从本地路径提取扩展名 */
export function extFromPath(filePath: string): string {
  const ext = filePath.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
  return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext) ? ext : '';
}

/** 从本地路径推导 MIME */
export function mimeFromPath(filePath: string): string {
  return mimeFromExt(extFromPath(filePath));
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * Markdown 参考图解析与正文替换（spec §5）。
 * 纯函数模块，无 VS Code / Node 依赖，方便单元测试。
 */

import type { ParsedResult, ImageRef } from './shared';

/**
 * 解析 Markdown 中的图片引用语法。
 * 支持普通路径 `![alt](path)` 与尖括号包裹 `![alt](<path with spaces>)`。
 * 按首次出现顺序去重编号，同一路径复用同一序号。
 * 正文中每处图片语法替换为 `[imageN](文件名去扩展名)`。
 */
export function parseReferences(mdContent: string): ParsedResult {
  const references: ImageRef[] = [];
  const seen = new Map<string, number>(); // path → index

  // 匹配 ![alt](路径) 或 ![alt](<路径>)，其中路径不含 ) 除非在 <> 内
  const imgRegex = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\((<[^>]*>|[^)]*)\)/g;

  const replacedText = mdContent.replace(imgRegex, (match, alt: string, rawPath: string) => {
    // 解析实际路径：去掉可能的尖括号包裹
    let path: string;
    if (rawPath.startsWith('<') && rawPath.endsWith('>')) {
      path = rawPath.slice(1, -1).trim();
    } else {
      path = rawPath.trim();
    }

    // 去重：同一路径复用已有序号
    let index = seen.get(path);
    if (index === undefined) {
      index = references.length + 1;
      seen.set(path, index);
      references.push({ alt: alt.trim(), path, index });
    }

    // 替换为 [imageN](文件名去扩展名)
    const fileName = path.split(/[/\\]/).pop() ?? path;
    const nameWithoutExt = fileName.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
    return `[image${index}](${nameWithoutExt})`;
  });

  return { references, replacedText };
}

/** 校验 Markdown 内容非空（trim 后），空则抛出错误 */
export function validateNotEmpty(content: string): void {
  if (!content.trim()) {
    throw new Error('内容为空');
  }
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * Grsai API 调用层（spec §6）。
 * 包含请求体构造、模型系列区分、响应校验、超时处理。
 */

import type { GenerateResponse, ModelFamily } from './shared';

// ─── 模型系列判定 ───

export function getModelFamily(model: string): ModelFamily {
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') return 'gpt-image-2-vip';
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2') return 'gpt-image-2';
  // nano-banana, nano-banana-fast, nano-banana-2, nano-banana-2-cl,
  // nano-banana-pro, nano-banana-pro-cl, nano-banana-pro-vip 等均归此类
  return 'nano-banana';
}

// ─── gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算表 ───

interface PixelEntry {
  width: number;
  height: number;
}

/** 比例 + 分辨率 → 像素值查表 */
const VIP_PIXEL_TABLE: Record<string, Record<string, PixelEntry>> = {
  '1:1':  { '1K': { width: 1024, height: 1024 }, '2K': { width: 2048, height: 2048 }, '4K': { width: 2880, height: 2880 } },
  '3:4':  { '1K': { width: 864,  height: 1152  }, '2K': { width: 1728, height: 2304  }, '4K': { width: 2448, height: 3264 } },
  '4:3':  { '1K': { width: 1152, height: 864   }, '2K': { width: 2304, height: 1728  }, '4K': { width: 3264, height: 2448 } },
  '16:9': { '1K': { width: 1280, height: 720   }, '2K': { width: 2560, height: 1440  }, '4K': { width: 3840, height: 2160 } },
  '9:16': { '1K': { width: 720,  height: 1280  }, '2K': { width: 1440, height: 2560  }, '4K': { width: 2160, height: 3840 } },
};

/** gpt-image-2-vip：比例 + 分辨率 → 像素值字符串（如 "864x1152"） */
export function vipPixelSize(aspectRatio: string, imageSize: string): string {
  const entry = VIP_PIXEL_TABLE[aspectRatio]?.[imageSize];
  if (!entry) {
    throw new Error(`不支持的 vip 像素组合: ${aspectRatio} + ${imageSize}`);
  }
  return `${entry.width}x${entry.height}`;
}

// ─── 请求体构造 ───

export interface GenerateParams {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images?: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  replyType: 'json' | 'async';
}

/** 构造 POST /v1/api/generate 请求体，按模型系列区分尺寸字段 */
export function buildRequestBody(params: GenerateParams): Record<string, unknown> {
  const family = getModelFamily(params.model);
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: params.model,
    prompt: params.prompt,
    images: params.images ?? [],
    replyType: params.replyType,
  };

  switch (family) {
    case 'nano-banana':
      body.aspectRatio = params.aspectRatio;
      body.imageSize = params.imageSize;
      break;
    case 'gpt-image-2':
      body.aspectRatio = params.aspectRatio;
      break;
    case 'gpt-image-2-vip':
      body.aspectRatio = vipPixelSize(params.aspectRatio, params.imageSize);
      break;
  }

  return body;
}

// ─── 响应校验 ───

const VALID_STATUSES = new Set(['running', 'succeeded', 'failed', 'violation']);

/** 运行时校验 API 响应结构，不通过则抛出 */
export function validateGenerateResponse(data: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (!data || typeof data !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：非对象');
  }
  const d = data as Record<string, unknown>;

  if (d.id !== undefined && typeof d.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：id 非字符串');
  }
  if (!d.status || !VALID_STATUSES.has(d.status as string)) {
    throw new Error(`响应格式异常：status 无效 (${String(d.status)})`);
  }

  const results = d.results;
  if (results !== undefined) {
    if (!Array.isArray(results)) {
      throw new Error('响应格式异常：results 非数组');
    }
    for (const item of results) {
      if (!item || typeof item !== 'object' || typeof (item as Record<string, unknown>).url !== 'string') {
        throw new Error('响应格式异常：results 项缺少 url');
      }
    }
  }

  return {
    id: typeof d.id === 'string' ? d.id : undefined,
    status: d.status as GenerateResponse['status'],
    results: results as GenerateResponse['results'] | undefined,
    progress: typeof d.progress === 'number' ? d.progress : undefined,
    error: typeof d.error === 'string' ? d.error : undefined,
  };
}

// ─── API 调用 ───

const TIMEOUT_MS = 30_000;

/** POST /v1/api/generate 提交生成请求 */
export async function submitGenerate(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  params: GenerateParams,
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), TIMEOUT_MS);

  try {
    const body = buildRequestBody(params);
    const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    const data: unknown = await response.json();
    return validateGenerateResponse(data);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/** GET /v1/api/result 查询异步任务结果 */
export async function queryResult(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  jobId: string,
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), TIMEOUT_MS);

  try {
    const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(jobId)}`;
    const response = await fetch(url, {
      method: 'GET',
      headers: {
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
      },
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    const data: unknown = await response.json();
    return validateGenerateResponse(data);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

// ─── 瞬时错误判定 ───

/** 判断错误是否为可重试的瞬时错误（5xx/429/网络问题） */
export function isTransientError(err: unknown): boolean {
  if (err instanceof TypeError) {
    // fetch failed / network error
    return true;
  }
  if (err instanceof DOMException && err.name === 'AbortError') {
    return true;
  }
  if (err && typeof err === 'object' && 'status' in err) {
    const status = (err as { status: number }).status;
    return status === 429 || (status >= 500 && status < 600);
  }
  return false;
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 配置读写（spec §4）。
 * apiKey 走 VS Code Secrets 存储，其余走 workspace configuration。
 * M1 简化版——完整 globalState patch 语义在 M2 侧栏化时补齐。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';

/** 从 Secrets 读取 apiKey */
export async function getApiKey(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<string> {
  return (await context.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey')) ?? '';
}

/** 写入 apiKey 到 Secrets */
export async function setApiKey(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, key: string): Promise<void> {
  await context.secrets.store('image-flow.apiKey', key);
}

/** 从 workspace configuration 读取配置（含默认值） */
export function getConfig(): {
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
} {
  const cfg = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
  return {
    baseUrl: cfg.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn'),
    model: cfg.get<string>('model', 'nano-banana-2'),
    aspectRatio: cfg.get<string>('aspectRatio', '3:4'),
    imageSize: cfg.get<string>('imageSize', '1K'),
    concurrency: cfg.get<number>('concurrency', 1),
    workbenchCols: cfg.get<number>('workbenchCols', 4),
    tasksCols: cfg.get<number>('tasksCols', 2),
    modelInjections: cfg.get<Record<string, string>>('modelInjections', {}),
  };
}

/** 校验 apiKey 已配置，未配置则提示用户去设置页填写 */
export async function ensureApiKey(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<string> {
  const apiKey = await getApiKey(context);
  if (!apiKey) {
    const goToSettings = '去设置页填写';
    const result = await vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
      '请先配置 Grsai API Key',
      goToSettings,
    );
    if (result === goToSettings) {
      await vscode.commands.executeCommand(
        'workbench.action.openSettings',
        'image-flow.apiKey',
      );
    }
    throw new Error('API Key 未配置');
  }
  return apiKey;
}

```

```typescript
/**
 * 生成流程编排（spec §7）。
 * M1 使用同步等待方式：提交 → 轮询 → 下载。
 * 异步任务机制（定时器、持久化、重启续拉）在 M3 补齐。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'node:path';
import * as fs from 'node:fs/promises';
import { parseReferences, validateNotEmpty } from './markdown-parser';
import { submitGenerate, queryResult } from './api';
import { mimeFromPath } from './image-utils';
import { getConfig, ensureApiKey } from './config';
import type { GenerateResponse } from './shared';

// ─── 工具 ───

function sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, ms));
}

/** 格式化时间戳：yyMMddHHmmSS */
function timestamp(): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const y = String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const M = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const d = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const h = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const m = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const s = String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${y}${M}${d}${h}${m}${s}`;
}

/** 已有的同秒任务文件夹数 → seq */
async function nextSeq(parentDir: string, ts: string): Promise<number> {
  let seq = 1;
  const prefix = `task-${ts}-`;
  try {
    const entries = await fs.readdir(parentDir);
    const existing = entries.filter((n) => n.startsWith(prefix));
    const nums = existing
      .map((n) => parseInt(n.slice(prefix.length), 10))
      .filter((n) => !isNaN(n));
    if (nums.length > 0) {
      seq = Math.max(...nums) + 1;
    }
  } catch {
    // 目录不存在或无权限，seq 从 1 开始
  }
  return seq;
}

// ─── 下载 ───

/** 下载单张图片到指定路径，返回文件绝对路径 */
async function downloadImage(url: string, filePath: string): Promise<string> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);

  try {
    const response = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal });
    const buffer = Buffer.from(await response.arrayBuffer());
    await fs.writeFile(filePath, buffer);
    return filePath;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/** 从 URL 提取安全扩展名（校验白名单，否则回退 png） */
function safeExtFromUrl(url: string): string {
  const { extFromUrl } = require('./image-utils');
  const ext = extFromUrl(url);
  return ext || 'png';
}

// ─── 轮询等待 ───

const POLL_INTERVAL = 2_000; // 2s
const POLL_TIMEOUT = 10 * 60 * 1_000; // 10 分钟

/** 同步等待异步任务完成（M1 简化实现） */
async function waitForCompletion(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  jobId: string,
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const start = Date.now();
  while (Date.now() - start < POLL_TIMEOUT) {
    await sleep(POLL_INTERVAL);
    const result = await queryResult(baseUrl, apiKey, jobId);
    if (result.status === 'succeeded' || result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
      return result;
    }
    // running — 继续等待
  }
  throw new Error('生成超时（10 分钟）');
}

// ─── 主流程 ───

/** 读取 Markdown 文件所在目录同级参考图，转为 data URI */
async function readReferenceImages(
  mdDir: string,
  refPaths: string[],
): Promise<string[]> {
  const errors: string[] = [];
  const images: string[] = [];

  for (const refPath of refPaths) {
    const resolved = path.resolve(mdDir, refPath);
    try {
      const buffer = await fs.readFile(resolved);
      const mime = mimeFromPath(resolved);
      const b64 = buffer.toString('base64');
      images.push(`data:${mime};base64,${b64}`);
    } catch {
      errors.push(refPath);
    }
  }

  if (errors.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
  }

  return images;
}

/**
 * 对单个 Markdown 文件执行生成流程。
 * 这是 M1 的核心——同步等待完成。
 */
export async function generateForMarkdown(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
): Promise<void> {
  // 1. 校验 apiKey
  const apiKey = await ensureApiKey(context);

  // 2. 读取 Markdown 内容
  const mdContent = Buffer.from(await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri)).toString('utf-8');
  validateNotEmpty(mdContent);

  // 3. 解析参考图
  const { references, replacedText } = parseReferences(mdContent);

  // 4. 读取参考图并编码
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const refPaths = references.map((r) => r.path);
  const images = await readReferenceImages(mdDir, refPaths);

  // 5. 获取配置
  const config = getConfig();
  const mdFileName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

  // 6. 创建任务文件夹
  const ts = timestamp();
  const seq = await nextSeq(mdDir, ts);
  const folderName = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
  const folderPath = path.join(mdDir, folderName);
  await fs.mkdir(folderPath, { recursive: true });

  // 7. 并发提交 N 个 job
  const N = config.concurrency;
  const submitResults: { ok: boolean; response?: GenerateResponse; error?: string }[] = [];
  const submitPromises = Array.from({ length: N }, () =>
    submitGenerate(config.baseUrl, apiKey, {
      model: config.model,
      prompt: replacedText,
      images: images.length > 0 ? images : undefined,
      aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
      imageSize: config.imageSize,
      replyType: 'json',
    }).then(
      (resp) => ({ ok: true, response: resp }),
      (err) => ({ ok: false, error: String(err) }),
    ),
  );

  const settled = await Promise.all(submitPromises);
  submitResults.push(...settled);

  // 8. 全部提交失败 → 作废、删空文件夹、报错
  const allFailed = submitResults.every((r) => !r.ok);
  if (allFailed) {
    const errors = [...new Set(submitResults.map((r) => r.error!))];
    await fs.rmdir(folderPath);
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`所有请求提交失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
    return;
  }

  // 9. 逐个等待完成并下载
  let imageIndex = 0;
  let hasSuccess = false;
  const failures: string[] = [];

  for (const result of submitResults) {
    if (!result.ok || !result.response) {
      failures.push(result.error ?? '提交失败');
      continue;
    }

    let final = result.response;

    // 如果返回 running，等待完成
    if (final.status === 'running') {
      try {
        final = await waitForCompletion(config.baseUrl, apiKey, final.id!);
      } catch (err) {
        failures.push(String(err));
        continue;
      }
    }

    if (final.status === 'succeeded' && final.results) {
      for (const item of final.results) {
        imageIndex++;
        const ext = safeExtFromUrl(item.url);
        const fileName = `${mdFileName}-${imageIndex}.${ext}`;
        const filePath = path.join(folderPath, fileName);
        await downloadImage(item.url, filePath);
      }
      hasSuccess = true;
    } else {
      const errMsg = final.error ?? `状态: ${final.status}`;
      failures.push(errMsg);
    }
  }

  // 10. 通知
  if (failures.length > 0) {
    const unique = [...new Set(failures)];
    if (hasSuccess) {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(`部分图片生成失败：\n${unique.join('\n')}`);
    } else {
      // 无成图 → 删空文件夹 + 错误通知
      try { await fs.rmdir(folderPath); } catch { /* 文件夹不空则忽略 */ }
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：\n${unique.join('\n')}`);
    }
  } else {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成，图片已保存到 ${folderName}`);
  }
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * image-flow 扩展入口（spec §3）。
 * M1：注册命令，对接生成流程。侧栏 Provider 为占位，M2 充实。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { generateForMarkdown } from './generate';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  // ─── 命令：生成 AI 图片 ───

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      try {
        // 优先用传入的 URI（资源管理器右键），其次活动编辑器
        const targetUri = uri ?? vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
        if (!targetUri) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
          return;
        }
        if (!targetUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('仅支持 Markdown (.md) 文件');
          return;
        }

        await generateForMarkdown(context, targetUri);
      } catch (err) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
      }
    }),
  );

  // ─── 命令：预览请求（M5 实现，M1 占位） ───

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async () => {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本中实现');
    }),
  );

  // ─── 侧栏 Provider（M2 实现，M1 占位） ───

  // M1 暂不注册 webview，侧栏不可见。
  // M2 将通过 registerWebviewViewProvider 注册完整侧栏。
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // M3 做持久化时补充清理逻辑
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 前后端共享类型与消息协议。
 * 由扩展主进程与 Webview 前端共同引用，避免协议漂移。
 */

// ========== 配置 ==========

export interface AppConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

// ========== 任务与 Job ==========

export type JobStatus = 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';

export interface Job {
  id?: string;
  status: JobStatus;
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
  images?: string[];
  urlIndex?: number;
}

export interface Task {
  folderName: string;
  folderPath: string;
  mdFileName: string;
  model: string;
  jobs: Job[];
  startedAt: number;
  sessionStartedAt: number;
  status: 'active' | 'done';
}

// ========== 素材库 ==========

export type MaterialLibKind = 'auto' | 'manual';

export interface MaterialLib {
  kind: MaterialLibKind;
  label: string;
  dirPath: string;
  images: string[];
}

// ========== Markdown 解析产物 ==========

export interface ImageRef {
  path: string;
  index: number;
  alt: string;
}

export interface ParseResult {
  references: ImageRef[];
  replacedText: string;
}

// ========== 消息协议 ==========

export type ExtMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; config: AppConfig; currentMd: MdInfo | null; tasks: Task[]; history: HistoryItem[]; materialLibs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; config: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: Task[] }
  | { type: 'historyUpdate'; history: HistoryItem[] }
  | { type: 'materialLibsUpdate'; libs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'currentMdUpdate'; md: MdInfo | null }
  | { type: 'error'; message: string }
  | { type: 'generationStarted' };

export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'previewRequest' }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'addMaterialLib' }
  | { type: 'removeMaterialLib'; path: string }
  | { type: 'openImage'; path: string }
  | { type: 'insertReference'; imagePath: string }
  | { type: 'openExternalUrl'; url: string };

// ========== 其他 ==========

export interface MdInfo {
  path: string;
  fileName: string;
}

export interface HistoryItem {
  folderName: string;
  folderPath: string;
  imageCount: number;
  images: string[];
}

```

```typescript
/**
 * 图片类型白名单与工具函数。
 * 供素材库扫描、历史扫描、下载扩展名校验与 MIME 推断共用。
 */

export const IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST = ['png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg'];

const EXT_TO_MIME: Record<string, string> = {
  png: 'image/png',
  jpg: 'image/jpeg',
  jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
  gif: 'image/gif',
  webp: 'image/webp',
  bmp: 'image/bmp',
  svg: 'image/svg+xml',
};

/** 判断文件名是否为图片（不区分大小写）。 */
export function isImageFile(name: string): boolean {
  const ext = name.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
  return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.includes(ext);
}

/** 从 URL 路径提取扩展名，校验白名单，否则返回 'png'。 */
export function extFromUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const pathname = new URL(url).pathname;
    const ext = pathname.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
    return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.includes(ext) ? ext : 'png';
  } catch {
    return 'png';
  }
}

/** 从文件名提取扩展名，校验白名单，否则返回 'png'。 */
export function extFromFileName(name: string): string {
  const ext = name.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
  return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.includes(ext) ? ext : 'png';
}

/** 扩展名 → MIME 类型映射。 */
export function mimeFromExt(ext: string): string {
  return EXT_TO_MIME[ext.toLowerCase()] ?? 'image/png';
}

/** 从文件名推断 MIME 类型。 */
export function mimeFromFileName(name: string): string {
  return mimeFromExt(extFromFileName(name));
}

```

```typescript
/**
 * Markdown 参考图解析与替换。
 * 匹配 ![alt](路径) 语法，支持 <> 包裹路径（含空格与半角括号），
 * 按首次出现顺序去重编号，替换正文为 [imageN](文件名去扩展名)。
 */

import * as path from 'path';
import { ImageRef, ParseResult } from './shared';

/** 空内容错误。 */
export function validateNotEmpty(content: string): void {
  if (content.trim() === '') {
    throw new Error('内容为空');
  }
}

/**
 * 解析 Markdown 正文中的图片引用。
 * 路径支持普通形式 `![alt](path)` 与尖括号包裹 `![alt](<path with spaces>)`。
 * 同一路径复用同一编号，按首次出现顺序递增。
 */
export function parseReferences(mdContent: string): ParseResult {
  // 匹配 ![...](...) 或 ![...](<...>)
  const imgRegex = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\((<)?([^)>]+?)(?(2)>)\)/g;

  const refMap = new Map<string, ImageRef>();
  let replacedText = mdContent;
  let counter = 0;

  // 先收集所有引用去重编号
  const matches: Array<{ full: string; alt: string; rawPath: string }> = [];
  let match: RegExpExecArray | null;
  while ((match = imgRegex.exec(mdContent)) !== null) {
    const alt = match[1];
    const rawPath = match[3];
    const normalizedPath = rawPath.trim();
    if (!refMap.has(normalizedPath)) {
      refMap.set(normalizedPath, {
        path: normalizedPath,
        index: ++counter,
        alt,
      });
    }
    matches.push({ full: match[0], alt, rawPath: normalizedPath });
  }

  if (refMap.size === 0) {
    return { references: [], replacedText: mdContent };
  }

  // 替换正文：每处图片语法 → [imageN](图片文件名去扩展名)
  imgRegex.lastIndex = 0;
  replacedText = mdContent.replace(imgRegex, (_full, alt, _open, rawPath, _close) => {
    const ref = refMap.get(rawPath.trim());
    if (!ref) return _full;
    const baseName = path.basename(rawPath.trim());
    const nameWithoutExt = baseName.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
    return `[image${ref.index}](${nameWithoutExt})`;
  });

  const references = Array.from(refMap.values()).sort((a, b) => a.index - b.index);
  return { references, replacedText };
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * Grsai API 调用层。
 * POST /v1/api/generate 提交生成请求，GET /v1/api/result 轮询结果。
 * 尺寸字段按模型系列区分，gpt-image-2-vip 查表换算像素值。
 */

import { IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST } from './image-utils';

// ========== 响应类型 ==========

export interface GrsaiResultItem {
  url: string;
}

export interface GrsaiGenerateResponse {
  id?: string;
  status?: string;
  results?: GrsaiResultItem[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

// ========== 模型系列判定 ==========

export type ModelFamily = 'nano-banana' | 'gpt-image-2' | 'gpt-image-2-vip';

export function modelFamily(model: string): ModelFamily {
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') return 'gpt-image-2-vip';
  if (model.startsWith('gpt-image-2')) return 'gpt-image-2';
  return 'nano-banana';
}

// ========== gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算 ==========

/**
 * gpt-image-2-vip 比例 + 分辨率 → 像素尺寸查表。
 * 约束：最大边长 ≤ 3840，两边均为 16 倍数，长短边比 ≤ 3:1，
 * 总像素 655,360~8,294,400。
 */
const VIP_PIXEL_TABLE: Record<string, Record<string, string>> = {
  '1:1':   { '1K': '1024x1024', '2K': '2048x2048', '4K': '2880x2880' },
  '3:4':   { '1K': '864x1152',  '2K': '1728x2304', '4K': '2448x3264' },
  '4:3':   { '1K': '1152x864',  '2K': '2304x1728', '4K': '3264x2448' },
  '16:9':  { '1K': '1280x720',  '2K': '2560x1440', '4K': '3840x2160' },
  '9:16':  { '1K': '720x1280',  '2K': '1440x2560', '4K': '2160x3840' },
};

export function vipPixelSize(aspectRatio: string, imageSize: string): string {
  const row = VIP_PIXEL_TABLE[aspectRatio];
  if (!row) {
    throw new Error(`gpt-image-2-vip 不支持比例 ${aspectRatio}，可选：${Object.keys(VIP_PIXEL_TABLE).join(', ')}`);
  }
  const pixels = row[imageSize];
  if (!pixels) {
    throw new Error(`gpt-image-2-vip 不支持分辨率 ${imageSize}，可选：1K / 2K / 4K`);
  }
  return pixels;
}

// ========== API 请求 ==========

/**
 * 按模型系列组装尺寸字段。
 * - nano-banana: aspectRatio + imageSize
 * - gpt-image-2: 仅 aspectRatio（比例字符串）
 * - gpt-image-2-vip: 仅 aspectRatio（像素值，查表换算）
 */
function buildSizeFields(model: string, aspectRatio: string, imageSize: string): Record<string, string> {
  const family = modelFamily(model);
  switch (family) {
    case 'nano-banana':
      return { aspectRatio, imageSize };
    case 'gpt-image-2':
      return { aspectRatio };
    case 'gpt-image-2-vip':
      return { aspectRatio: vipPixelSize(aspectRatio, imageSize) };
  }
}

export interface GenerateParams {
  baseUrl: string;
  apiKey: string;
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
}

/**
 * 提交生成请求（同步模式 replyType: 'json'）。
 * 带 30s 超时，非2xx 响应抛出带 status 的错误。
 */
export async function submitGenerate(params: GenerateParams): Promise<GrsaiGenerateResponse> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);

  try {
    const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
      model: params.model,
      prompt: params.prompt,
      images: params.images,
      replyType: 'json',
      ...buildSizeFields(params.model, params.aspectRatio, params.imageSize),
    };

    const res = await fetch(`${params.baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        Authorization: `Bearer ${params.apiKey}`,
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    if (!res.ok) {
      const text = await res.text().catch(() => '');
      throw new Error(`API 返回 HTTP ${res.status}${text ? ': ' + text : ''}`);
    }

    const data: unknown = await res.json();
    return validateGenerateResponse(data);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/**
 * 轮询异步任务结果。
 * 带 30s 超时。
 */
export async function queryResult(baseUrl: string, apiKey: string, jobId: string): Promise<GrsaiGenerateResponse> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);

  try {
    const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(jobId)}`;
    const res = await fetch(url, {
      method: 'GET',
      headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${apiKey}` },
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    if (!res.ok) {
      const text = await res.text().catch(() => '');
      throw new Error(`查询结果 HTTP ${res.status}${text ? ': ' + text : ''}`);
    }

    const data: unknown = await res.json();
    return validateGenerateResponse(data);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

// ========== 响应校验 ==========

const VALID_STATUSES = new Set(['running', 'succeeded', 'failed', 'violation']);

export function validateGenerateResponse(data: unknown): GrsaiGenerateResponse {
  if (data === null || typeof data !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：不是 JSON 对象');
  }

  const obj = data as Record<string, unknown>;

  // id: 存在时须为 string
  if (obj.id !== undefined && typeof obj.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error(`响应格式异常：id 应为 string，实际 ${typeof obj.id}`);
  }

  // status: 存在时须为合法枚举
  if (obj.status !== undefined) {
    if (typeof obj.status !== 'string' || !VALID_STATUSES.has(obj.status)) {
      throw new Error(`响应格式异常：status 值非法 "${String(obj.status)}"`);
    }
  }

  // results: 存在时须为数组且每项含 url string
  if (obj.results !== undefined) {
    if (!Array.isArray(obj.results)) {
      throw new Error('响应格式异常：results 应为数组');
    }
    for (const item of obj.results) {
      if (!item || typeof item !== 'object' || typeof (item as Record<string, unknown>).url !== 'string') {
        throw new Error('响应格式异常：results[].url 缺失或非 string');
      }
    }
  }

  // progress: 存在时须为 number
  if (obj.progress !== undefined && typeof obj.progress !== 'number') {
    throw new Error(`响应格式异常：progress 应为 number，实际 ${typeof obj.progress}`);
  }

  // error: 存在时须为 string
  if (obj.error !== undefined && typeof obj.error !== 'string') {
    throw new Error(`响应格式异常：error 应为 string，实际 ${typeof obj.error}`);
  }

  return {
    id: obj.id as string | undefined,
    status: obj.status as string | undefined,
    results: (obj.results as Array<{ url: string }> | undefined)?.map(r => ({ url: r.url })),
    progress: obj.progress as number | undefined,
    error: obj.error as string | undefined,
  };
}

// ========== 瞬时错误判定 ==========

/**
 * 判断轮询/请求错误是否可重试（瞬时错误）。
 * HTTP 5xx / 429 / fetch failed / abort 为瞬时；
 * 格式异常、其他 4xx 为非瞬时。
 */
export function isTransientError(error: unknown): boolean {
  const msg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
  // HTTP 5xx
  if (/\bHTTP 5\d\d\b/.test(msg)) return true;
  // HTTP 429
  if (/\bHTTP 429\b/.test(msg)) return true;
  // fetch failed (network layer)
  if (error instanceof TypeError && error.message === 'fetch failed') return true;
  // abort
  if (error instanceof DOMException && error.name === 'AbortError') return true;
  return false;
}

// ========== 模型匹配 ==========

/** 检查模型名是否属于 nano-banana 系列 (用于注入种子的逻辑) */
export function isNanoBananaModel(model: string): boolean {
  return modelFamily(model) === 'nano-banana';
}

/** 检查模型名是否属于 gpt-image-2 系列 (用于注入种子的逻辑) */
export function isGptImage2Model(model: string): boolean {
  return modelFamily(model) === 'gpt-image-2' || modelFamily(model) === 'gpt-image-2-vip';
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 配置读写模块。
 * apiKey 走 VS Code Secrets 加密存储，其余配置走 workspace configuration。
 * M2 将在 globalState/workspaceState 上做即时保存；M1 用 VS Code 原生配置机制。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { AppConfig } from './shared';

/** 从 VS Code Secrets 读取 apiKey。 */
export async function getApiKey(secrets: vscode.SecretStorage): Promise<string> {
  return (await secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey')) ?? '';
}

/** 将 apiKey 写入 VS Code Secrets。 */
export async function setApiKey(secrets: vscode.SecretStorage, key: string): Promise<void> {
  await secrets.store('image-flow.apiKey', key);
}

/** 拼装完整配置快照。 */
export function getAppConfig(): AppConfig {
  const cfg = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
  return {
    apiKey: '', // 由调用方从 secrets 填入
    baseUrl: cfg.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn'),
    model: cfg.get<string>('model', 'nano-banana-2'),
    aspectRatio: cfg.get<string>('aspectRatio', '3:4'),
    imageSize: cfg.get<string>('imageSize', '1K'),
    concurrency: cfg.get<number>('concurrency', 1),
    workbenchCols: cfg.get<number>('workbenchCols', 4),
    tasksCols: cfg.get<number>('tasksCols', 2),
    modelInjections: cfg.get<Record<string, string>>('modelInjections', {}),
  };
}

/** 校验 apiKey 已配置。 */
export function ensureApiKey(apiKey: string): void {
  if (!apiKey) {
    throw new Error('请先配置 API Key：打开设置 → Image Flow → Api Key');
  }
}

```

##### ✍️  Write `generate.ts`

`07:01:51`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612144918/src/generate.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * 生成流程编排。
 * M1 阶段使用同步等待模式：replyType: 'json'，等待 API 直接返回结果。
 * 若返回 running 状态则轮询直至终结。
 */

import * as fs from 'fs/promises';
import * as path from 'path';
import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { ensureApiKey, getApiKey, getAppConfig } from './config';
import { parseReferences, validateNotEmpty } from './markdown-parser';
import { submitGenerate, queryResult } from './api';
import { mimeFromFileName, extFromUrl } from './image-utils';

/**
 * 生成图片命令入口。
 * 1. 校验 apiKey
 * 2. 读取当前 MD → 解析参考图 → 组装 prompt
 * 3. 创建 task 文件夹
 * 4. 调用 API（同步等待）
 * 5. 下载结果图片
 */
export async function generateImage(secrets: vscode.SecretStorage): Promise<void> {
  const apiKey = await getApiKey(secrets);
  ensureApiKey(apiKey);

  const editor = vscode.window.activeTextEditor;
  if (!editor || !editor.document.fileName.endsWith('.md')) {
    throw new Error('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
  }

  const mdPath = editor.document.fileName;
  const mdContent = editor.document.getText();
  validateNotEmpty(mdContent);

  const config = getAppConfig();

  // 解析 Markdown → 获取参考图列表与替换后正文
  const { references, replacedText } = parseReferences(mdContent);

  // 读取参考图并转为 base64 data URI
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdPath);
  const images: string[] = [];
  const failedPaths: string[] = [];

  for (const ref of references) {
    try {
      const imgPath = path.resolve(mdDir, ref.path);
      const buf = await fs.readFile(imgPath);
      const mime = mimeFromFileName(ref.path);
      const dataUri = `data:${mime};base64,${buf.toString('base64')}`;
      images.push(dataUri);
    } catch {
      failedPaths.push(ref.path);
    }
  }

  if (failedPaths.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败：\n${failedPaths.join('\n')}`);
  }

  const prompt = replacedText;

  // 创建 task 文件夹（时间戳 + seq）
  const taskFolder = await createTaskFolder(mdDir, mdPath);
  const mdBaseName = path.basename(mdPath, '.md');

  // 提交生成请求（同步等待）
  const response = await submitGenerate({
    baseUrl: config.baseUrl,
    apiKey,
    model: config.model,
    prompt,
    images,
    aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
    imageSize: config.imageSize,
  });

  // 处理返回：直接返回结果 或 running 需要轮询
  let finalResponse = response;
  if (response.status === 'running' && response.id) {
    // 同步轮询直到终结
    finalResponse = await waitForCompletion(config.baseUrl, apiKey, response.id);
  }

  if (!finalResponse.results || finalResponse.results.length === 0) {
    const errMsg = finalResponse.error ?? '生成失败，未返回图片';
    if (finalResponse.status === 'violation' || finalResponse.status === 'failed') {
      throw new Error(`生成失败：${errMsg}`);
    }
    throw new Error(`生成失败：${errMsg}`);
  }

  // 下载图片到任务文件夹
  let seq = 1;
  for (const item of finalResponse.results) {
    const ext = extFromUrl(item.url);
    const fileName = `${mdBaseName}-${seq}.${ext}`;
    const destPath = path.join(taskFolder, fileName);
    await downloadFile(item.url, destPath);
    seq++;
  }

  vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成：${finalResponse.results.length} 张图片 → ${path.basename(taskFolder)}`);
}

/**
 * 同步轮询，每 2 秒查一次直到任务终结或超时（10 分钟）。
 */
async function waitForCompletion(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  jobId: string,
): Promise<{ results?: Array<{ url: string }>; status?: string; error?: string }> {
  const deadline = Date.now() + 10 * 60 * 1000; // 10 分钟超时

  while (Date.now() < deadline) {
    await sleep(2000);
    const res = await queryResult(baseUrl, apiKey, jobId);

    if (res.status === 'succeeded' || res.status === 'failed' || res.status === 'violation') {
      return res;
    }
    // running 继续轮询
  }

  throw new Error('生成超时（10 分钟）');
}

/** 创建 task-<时间戳>-<seq> 文件夹，返回其路径。 */
async function createTaskFolder(mdDir: string, mdPath: string): Promise<string> {
  const now = new Date();
  const ts = formatTimestamp(now);
  const mdBase = path.basename(mdPath, '.md');

  // 查找同秒最大 seq
  let seq = 0;
  const prefix = `task-${ts}-`;
  try {
    const entries = await fs.readdir(mdDir);
    for (const name of entries) {
      if (name.startsWith(prefix)) {
        const rest = name.slice(prefix.length);
        const num = parseInt(rest, 10);
        if (!isNaN(num) && num > seq) seq = num;
      }
    }
  } catch {
    // dir 不存在或不可读，seq 保持 0
  }

  seq++;
  const folderName = `${prefix}${seq}`;
  const folderPath = path.join(mdDir, folderName);
  await fs.mkdir(folderPath, { recursive: true });
  return folderPath;
}

function formatTimestamp(d: Date): string {
  const y = d.getFullYear().toString();
  const m = (d.getMonth() + 1).toString().padStart(2, '0');
  const day = d.getDate().toString().padStart(2, '0');
  const h = d.getHours().toString().padStart(2, '0');
  const min = d.getMinutes().toString().padStart(2, '0');
  const s = d.getSeconds().toString().padStart(2, '0');
  return `${y}${m}${day}${h}${min}${s}`;
}

/** 下载远程文件到本地。 */
async function downloadFile(url: string, destPath: string): Promise<void> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);

  try {
    const res = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal });
    if (!res.ok) {
      throw new Error(`下载图片失败 HTTP ${res.status}: ${url}`);
    }
    const buf = Buffer.from(await res.arrayBuffer());
    await fs.writeFile(destPath, buf);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

function sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise(resolve => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
}

```

```typescript
/**
 * 扩展激活入口。
 * - 注册命令 image-flow.generateImage 和 image-flow.previewRequest。
 * - M1 阶段侧栏为占位；M2 接入 WebviewViewProvider。
 * - 所有可释放对象 push 进 context.subscriptions。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { generateImage } from './generate';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  console.log('image-flow activated');

  // 注册 generateImage 命令
  const genCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async () => {
    try {
      await generateImage(context.secrets);
    } catch (err) {
      const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`Image Flow: ${msg}`);
    }
  });
  context.subscriptions.push(genCmd);

  // 注册 previewRequest 命令（M5 实现，M1 占位）
  const previewCmd = vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async () => {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本中实现');
  });
  context.subscriptions.push(previewCmd);

  // 注册侧栏 Webview Provider（M2 实现，M1 占位）
  // 占位 provider 防止侧栏视图为空导致活动栏图标不可见。
  const sidebarProvider = new PlaceholderSidebarProvider(context.extensionUri);
  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
  );
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // 资源由 context.subscriptions 自动释放
}

/** M1 占位侧栏 Provider，仅显示提示文字。 */
class PlaceholderSidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  constructor(private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: false,
      localResourceRoots: [vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media')],
    };
    webviewView.webview.html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head><meta charset="UTF-8"></head>
<body style="padding:16px;font-family:sans-serif;color:var(--vscode-foreground);">
  <p>image-flow 侧栏将在 M2 阶段启用。</p>
  <p>右键 Markdown 文件 → "Image Flow: 生成 AI 图片" 即可开始使用。</p>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}
```

```
/**
 * 前后端共享的消息协议与类型定义。
 * 此模块同时被扩展主进程与 webview 前端引用，避免协议漂移。
 */

// ─── 配置类型 ───

export interface AppConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

// ─── 任务与 Job 类型 ───

export type JobStatus = 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';

export interface Job {
  id?: string;
  status: JobStatus;
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
  images?: string[];
}

export interface Task {
  folderName: string;
  folderPath: string;
  mdFileName: string;
  model: string;
  jobs: Job[];
  startedAt: number;
  sessionStartedAt: number;
  status: 'active' | 'done';
}

// ─── 素材库类型 ───

export interface MaterialLib {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  images: string[];
  isAuto: boolean;
}

// ─── Markdown 信息 ───

export interface MdInfo {
  path: string;
  fileName: string;
}

// ─── 消息协议 ───

export type ExtMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; config: AppConfig; currentMd: MdInfo | null; tasks: Task[]; history: HistoryItem[]; materialLibs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; config: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: Task[] }
  | { type: 'historyUpdate'; history: HistoryItem[] }
  | { type: 'materialLibsUpdate'; libs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'currentMdUpdate'; md: MdInfo | null }
  | { type: 'error'; message: string }
  | { type: 'generationStarted' };

export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'previewRequest' }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'addMaterialLib' }
  | { type: 'removeMaterialLib'; path: string }
  | { type: 'openImage'; path: string }
  | { type: 'insertReference'; imagePath: string }
  | { type: 'openExternalUrl'; url: string };

// ─── 历史记录 ───

export interface HistoryItem {
  folderName: string;
  folderPath: string;
  imageCount: number;
  images: string[];
}

// ─── Markdown 解析结果 ───

export interface ImageRef {
  alt: string;
  path: string;
  index: number;
}

export interface ParsedResult {
  references: ImageRef[];
  replacedText: string;
}

// ─── API 类型 ───

export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images?: string[];
  aspectRatio?: string;
  imageSize?: string;
  replyType: 'json' | 'async';
}

export interface ApiResultItem {
  url: string;
}

export interface GenerateResponse {
  id?: string;
  status: 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  results?: ApiResultItem[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

export type ModelFamily = 'nano-banana' | 'gpt-image-2' | 'gpt-image-2-vip';

// ─── 预览类型 ───

export interface PreviewContent {
  prompt: string;
  endpoint: string;
  requestParams: string;
  referenceOverview: string;
}
```
