```typescript
/**
 * Grsai API 调用层（spec §6）。
 * 包含请求体构造、模型系列区分、响应校验、超时处理。
 */

import type { GenerateResponse, ModelFamily } from './shared';

// ─── 模型系列判定 ───

export function getModelFamily(model: string): ModelFamily {
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2-vip') return 'gpt-image-2-vip';
  if (model === 'gpt-image-2') return 'gpt-image-2';
  // nano-banana, nano-banana-fast, nano-banana-2, nano-banana-2-cl,
  // nano-banana-pro, nano-banana-pro-cl, nano-banana-pro-vip 等均归此类
  return 'nano-banana';
}

// ─── gpt-image-2-vip 像素换算表 ───

interface PixelEntry {
  width: number;
  height: number;
}

/** 比例 + 分辨率 → 像素值查表 */
const VIP_PIXEL_TABLE: Record<string, Record<string, PixelEntry>> = {
  '1:1':  { '1K': { width: 1024, height: 1024 }, '2K': { width: 2048, height: 2048 }, '4K': { width: 2880, height: 2880 } },
  '3:4':  { '1K': { width: 864,  height: 1152  }, '2K': { width: 1728, height: 2304  }, '4K': { width: 2448, height: 3264 } },
  '4:3':  { '1K': { width: 1152, height: 864   }, '2K': { width: 2304, height: 1728  }, '4K': { width: 3264, height: 2448 } },
  '16:9': { '1K': { width: 1280, height: 720   }, '2K': { width: 2560, height: 1440  }, '4K': { width: 3840, height: 2160 } },
  '9:16': { '1K': { width: 720,  height: 1280  }, '2K': { width: 1440, height: 2560  }, '4K': { width: 2160, height: 3840 } },
};

/** gpt-image-2-vip：比例 + 分辨率 → 像素值字符串（如 "864x1152"） */
export function vipPixelSize(aspectRatio: string, imageSize: string): string {
  const entry = VIP_PIXEL_TABLE[aspectRatio]?.[imageSize];
  if (!entry) {
    throw new Error(`不支持的 vip 像素组合: ${aspectRatio} + ${imageSize}`);
  }
  return `${entry.width}x${entry.height}`;
}

// ─── 请求体构造 ───

export interface GenerateParams {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images?: string[];
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  replyType: 'json' | 'async';
}

/** 构造 POST /v1/api/generate 请求体，按模型系列区分尺寸字段 */
export function buildRequestBody(params: GenerateParams): Record<string, unknown> {
  const family = getModelFamily(params.model);
  const body: Record<string, unknown> = {
    model: params.model,
    prompt: params.prompt,
    images: params.images ?? [],
    replyType: params.replyType,
  };

  switch (family) {
    case 'nano-banana':
      body.aspectRatio = params.aspectRatio;
      body.imageSize = params.imageSize;
      break;
    case 'gpt-image-2':
      body.aspectRatio = params.aspectRatio;
      break;
    case 'gpt-image-2-vip':
      body.aspectRatio = vipPixelSize(params.aspectRatio, params.imageSize);
      break;
  }

  return body;
}

// ─── 响应校验 ───

const VALID_STATUSES = new Set(['running', 'succeeded', 'failed', 'violation']);

/** 运行时校验 API 响应结构，不通过则抛出 */
export function validateGenerateResponse(data: unknown): GenerateResponse {
  if (!data || typeof data !== 'object') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：非对象');
  }
  const d = data as Record<string, unknown>;

  if (d.id !== undefined && typeof d.id !== 'string') {
    throw new Error('响应格式异常：id 非字符串');
  }
  if (!d.status || !VALID_STATUSES.has(d.status as string)) {
    throw new Error(`响应格式异常：status 无效 (${String(d.status)})`);
  }

  const results = d.results;
  if (results !== undefined) {
    if (!Array.isArray(results)) {
      throw new Error('响应格式异常：results 非数组');
    }
    for (const item of results) {
      if (!item || typeof item !== 'object' || typeof (item as Record<string, unknown>).url !== 'string') {
        throw new Error('响应格式异常：results 项缺少 url');
      }
    }
  }

  return {
    id: typeof d.id === 'string' ? d.id : undefined,
    status: d.status as GenerateResponse['status'],
    results: results as GenerateResponse['results'] | undefined,
    progress: typeof d.progress === 'number' ? d.progress : undefined,
    error: typeof d.error === 'string' ? d.error : undefined,
  };
}

// ─── API 调用 ───

const TIMEOUT_MS = 30_000;

/** POST /v1/api/generate 提交生成请求 */
export async function submitGenerate(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  params: GenerateParams,
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), TIMEOUT_MS);

  try {
    const body = buildRequestBody(params);
    const response = await fetch(`${baseUrl}/v1/api/generate`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    const data: unknown = await response.json();
    return validateGenerateResponse(data);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/** GET /v1/api/result 查询异步任务结果 */
export async function queryResult(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  jobId: string,
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), TIMEOUT_MS);

  try {
    const url = `${baseUrl}/v1/api/result?id=${encodeURIComponent(jobId)}`;
    const response = await fetch(url, {
      method: 'GET',
      headers: {
        'Authorization': `Bearer ${apiKey}`,
      },
      signal: controller.signal,
    });

    const data: unknown = await response.json();
    return validateGenerateResponse(data);
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

// ─── 瞬时错误判定 ───

/** 判断错误是否为可重试的瞬时错误（5xx/429/网络问题） */
export function isTransientError(err: unknown): boolean {
  if (err instanceof TypeError) {
    // fetch failed / network error
    return true;
  }
  if (err instanceof DOMException && err.name === 'AbortError') {
    return true;
  }
  if (err && typeof err === 'object' && 'status' in err) {
    const status = (err as { status: number }).status;
    return status === 429 || (status >= 500 && status < 600);
  }
  return false;
}

```
</details>

##### 👀 Read `generate.ts`

<details>
<summary><code>/home/particle/2026-1/harness-human-research/image-flow/runs/round3/eval-manual-supervised-gstack-260612144918/src/generate.ts</code></summary>

```typescript
/**
 * 生成流程编排（spec §7）。
 * M1 使用同步等待方式：提交 → 轮询 → 下载。
 * 异步任务机制（定时器、持久化、重启续拉）在 M3 补齐。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'node:path';
import * as fs from 'node:fs/promises';
import { parseReferences, validateNotEmpty } from './markdown-parser';
import { submitGenerate, queryResult } from './api';
import { mimeFromPath, extFromUrl } from './image-utils';
import { getConfig, ensureApiKey } from './config';
import type { GenerateResponse } from './shared';

// ─── 工具 ───

function sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, ms));
}

/** 格式化时间戳：yyMMddHHmmSS */
function timestamp(): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const y = String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const M = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const d = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const h = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const m = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const s = String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${y}${M}${d}${h}${m}${s}`;
}

/** 已有的同秒任务文件夹数 → seq */
async function nextSeq(parentDir: string, ts: string): Promise<number> {
  let seq = 1;
  const prefix = `task-${ts}-`;
  try {
    const entries = await fs.readdir(parentDir);
    const existing = entries.filter((n) => n.startsWith(prefix));
    const nums = existing
      .map((n) => parseInt(n.slice(prefix.length), 10))
      .filter((n) => !isNaN(n));
    if (nums.length > 0) {
      seq = Math.max(...nums) + 1;
    }
  } catch {
    // 目录不存在或无权限，seq 从 1 开始
  }
  return seq;
}

// ─── 下载 ───

/** 下载单张图片到指定路径，返回文件绝对路径 */
async function downloadImage(url: string, filePath: string): Promise<string> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);

  try {
    const response = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal });
    const buffer = Buffer.from(await response.arrayBuffer());
    await fs.writeFile(filePath, buffer);
    return filePath;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/** 从 URL 提取安全扩展名（校验白名单，否则回退 png） */
function safeExt(url: string): string {
  return extFromUrl(url) || 'png';
}

// ─── 轮询等待 ───

const POLL_INTERVAL = 2_000; // 2s
const POLL_TIMEOUT = 10 * 60 * 1_000; // 10 分钟

/** 同步等待异步任务完成（M1 简化实现） */
async function waitForCompletion(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  jobId: string,
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const start = Date.now();
  while (Date.now() - start < POLL_TIMEOUT) {
    await sleep(POLL_INTERVAL);
    const result = await queryResult(baseUrl, apiKey, jobId);
    if (result.status === 'succeeded' || result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
      return result;
    }
    // running — 继续等待
  }
  throw new Error('生成超时（10 分钟）');
}

// ─── 主流程 ───

/** 读取 Markdown 文件所在目录同级参考图，转为 data URI */
async function readReferenceImages(
  mdDir: string,
  refPaths: string[],
): Promise<string[]> {
  const errors: string[] = [];
  const images: string[] = [];

  for (const refPath of refPaths) {
    const resolved = path.resolve(mdDir, refPath);
    try {
      const buffer = await fs.readFile(resolved);
      const mime = mimeFromPath(resolved);
      const b64 = buffer.toString('base64');
      images.push(`data:${mime};base64,${b64}`);
    } catch {
      errors.push(refPath);
    }
  }

  if (errors.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
  }

  return images;
}

/**
 * 对单个 Markdown 文件执行生成流程。
 * 这是 M1 的核心——同步等待完成。
 */
export async function generateForMarkdown(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
): Promise<void> {
  // 1. 校验 apiKey
  const apiKey = await ensureApiKey(context);

  // 2. 读取 Markdown 内容
  const mdContent = Buffer.from(await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri)).toString('utf-8');
  validateNotEmpty(mdContent);

  // 3. 解析参考图
  const { references, replacedText } = parseReferences(mdContent);

  // 4. 读取参考图并编码
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const refPaths = references.map((r) => r.path);
  const images = await readReferenceImages(mdDir, refPaths);

  // 5. 获取配置
  const config = getConfig();
  const mdFileName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

  // 6. 创建任务文件夹
  const ts = timestamp();
  const seq = await nextSeq(mdDir, ts);
  const folderName = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
  const folderPath = path.join(mdDir, folderName);
  await fs.mkdir(folderPath, { recursive: true });

  // 7. 并发提交 N 个 job
  const N = config.concurrency;
  const submitResults: { ok: boolean; response?: GenerateResponse; error?: string }[] = [];
  const submitPromises = Array.from({ length: N }, () =>
    submitGenerate(config.baseUrl, apiKey, {
      model: config.model,
      prompt: replacedText,
      images: images.length > 0 ? images : undefined,
      aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
      imageSize: config.imageSize,
      replyType: 'json',
    }).then(
      (resp) => ({ ok: true, response: resp }),
      (err) => ({ ok: false, error: String(err) }),
    ),
  );

  const settled = await Promise.all(submitPromises);
  submitResults.push(...settled);

  // 8. 全部提交失败 → 作废、删空文件夹、报错
  const allFailed = submitResults.every((r) => !r.ok);
  if (allFailed) {
    const errors = [...new Set(submitResults.map((r) => r.error!))];
    await fs.rmdir(folderPath);
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`所有请求提交失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
    return;
  }

  // 9. 逐个等待完成并下载
  let imageIndex = 0;
  let hasSuccess = false;
  const failures: string[] = [];

  for (const result of submitResults) {
    if (!result.ok || !result.response) {
      failures.push(result.error ?? '提交失败');
      continue;
    }

    let final = result.response;

    // 如果返回 running，等待完成
    if (final.status === 'running') {
      try {
        final = await waitForCompletion(config.baseUrl, apiKey, final.id!);
      } catch (err) {
        failures.push(String(err));
        continue;
      }
    }

    if (final.status === 'succeeded' && final.results) {
      for (const item of final.results) {
        imageIndex++;
        const ext = safeExt(item.url);
        const fileName = `${mdFileName}-${imageIndex}.${ext}`;
        const filePath = path.join(folderPath, fileName);
        await downloadImage(item.url, filePath);
      }
      hasSuccess = true;
    } else {
      const errMsg = final.error ?? `状态: ${final.status}`;
      failures.push(errMsg);
    }
  }

  // 10. 通知
  if (failures.length > 0) {
    const unique = [...new Set(failures)];
    if (hasSuccess) {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(`部分图片生成失败：\n${unique.join('\n')}`);
    } else {
      // 无成图 → 删空文件夹 + 错误通知
      try { await fs.rmdir(folderPath); } catch { /* 文件夹不空则忽略 */ }
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：\n${unique.join('\n')}`);
    }
  } else {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成，图片已保存到 ${folderName}`);
  }
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 图片类型白名单与 MIME 工具函数。纯函数，无 VS Code 依赖。
 */

/** 图片扩展名白名单（spec §11） */
const IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST = new Set([
  'png', 'jpg', 'jpeg', 'gif', 'webp', 'bmp', 'svg',
]);

/** 扩展名 → MIME 类型映射 */
const EXT_TO_MIME: Record<string, string> = {
  png: 'image/png',
  jpg: 'image/jpeg',
  jpeg: 'image/jpeg',
  gif: 'image/gif',
  webp: 'image/webp',
  bmp: 'image/bmp',
  svg: 'image/svg+xml',
};

/** 判断文件名是否为图片 */
export function isImageFile(name: string): boolean {
  const ext = name.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
  return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext);
}

/** 从 URL 提取扩展名并校验白名单，无效则返回空串 */
export function extFromUrl(url: string): string {
  try {
    const pathname = new URL(url).pathname;
    const ext = pathname.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
    return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext) ? ext : '';
  } catch {
    return '';
  }
}

/** 扩展名 → MIME，不在白名单返回 png 的 MIME */
export function mimeFromExt(ext: string): string {
  return EXT_TO_MIME[ext.toLowerCase()] ?? 'image/png';
}

/** 从本地路径提取扩展名 */
export function extFromPath(filePath: string): string {
  const ext = filePath.split('.').pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? '';
  return IMAGE_EXT_WHITELIST.has(ext) ? ext : '';
}

/** 从本地路径推导 MIME */
export function mimeFromPath(filePath: string): string {
  return mimeFromExt(extFromPath(filePath));
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 配置读写（spec §4）。
 * apiKey 走 VS Code Secrets 存储，其余走 workspace configuration。
 * M1 简化版——完整 globalState patch 语义在 M2 侧栏化时补齐。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';

/** 从 Secrets 读取 apiKey */
export async function getApiKey(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<string> {
  return (await context.secrets.get('image-flow.apiKey')) ?? '';
}

/** 写入 apiKey 到 Secrets */
export async function setApiKey(context: vscode.ExtensionContext, key: string): Promise<void> {
  await context.secrets.store('image-flow.apiKey', key);
}

/** 从 workspace configuration 读取配置（含默认值） */
export function getConfig(): {
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
} {
  const cfg = vscode.workspace.getConfiguration('image-flow');
  return {
    baseUrl: cfg.get<string>('baseUrl', 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn'),
    model: cfg.get<string>('model', 'nano-banana-2'),
    aspectRatio: cfg.get<string>('aspectRatio', '3:4'),
    imageSize: cfg.get<string>('imageSize', '1K'),
    concurrency: cfg.get<number>('concurrency', 1),
    workbenchCols: cfg.get<number>('workbenchCols', 4),
    tasksCols: cfg.get<number>('tasksCols', 2),
    modelInjections: cfg.get<Record<string, string>>('modelInjections', {}),
  };
}

/** 校验 apiKey 已配置，未配置则提示用户去设置页填写 */
export async function ensureApiKey(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<string> {
  const apiKey = await getApiKey(context);
  if (!apiKey) {
    const goToSettings = '去设置页填写';
    const result = await vscode.window.showErrorMessage(
      '请先配置 Grsai API Key',
      goToSettings,
    );
    if (result === goToSettings) {
      await vscode.commands.executeCommand(
        'workbench.action.openSettings',
        'image-flow.apiKey',
      );
    }
    throw new Error('API Key 未配置');
  }
  return apiKey;
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * Markdown 参考图解析与正文替换（spec §5）。
 * 纯函数模块，无 VS Code / Node 依赖，方便单元测试。
 */

import type { ParsedResult, ImageRef } from './shared';

/**
 * 解析 Markdown 中的图片引用语法。
 * 支持普通路径 `![alt](path)` 与尖括号包裹 `![alt](<path with spaces>)`。
 * 按首次出现顺序去重编号，同一路径复用同一序号。
 * 正文中每处图片语法替换为 `[imageN](文件名去扩展名)`。
 */
export function parseReferences(mdContent: string): ParsedResult {
  const references: ImageRef[] = [];
  const seen = new Map<string, number>(); // path → index

  // 匹配 ![alt](路径) 或 ![alt](<路径>)，其中路径不含 ) 除非在 <> 内
  const imgRegex = /!\[([^\]]*)\]\((<[^>]*>|[^)]*)\)/g;

  const replacedText = mdContent.replace(imgRegex, (match, alt: string, rawPath: string) => {
    // 解析实际路径：去掉可能的尖括号包裹
    let path: string;
    if (rawPath.startsWith('<') && rawPath.endsWith('>')) {
      path = rawPath.slice(1, -1).trim();
    } else {
      path = rawPath.trim();
    }

    // 去重：同一路径复用已有序号
    let index = seen.get(path);
    if (index === undefined) {
      index = references.length + 1;
      seen.set(path, index);
      references.push({ alt: alt.trim(), path, index });
    }

    // 替换为 [imageN](文件名去扩展名)
    const fileName = path.split(/[/\\]/).pop() ?? path;
    const nameWithoutExt = fileName.replace(/\.[^.]+$/, '');
    return `[image${index}](${nameWithoutExt})`;
  });

  return { references, replacedText };
}

/** 校验 Markdown 内容非空（trim 后），空则抛出错误 */
export function validateNotEmpty(content: string): void {
  if (!content.trim()) {
    throw new Error('内容为空');
  }
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 前后端共享的消息协议与类型定义。
 * 此模块同时被扩展主进程与 webview 前端引用，避免协议漂移。
 */

// ─── 配置类型 ───

export interface AppConfig {
  apiKey: string;
  baseUrl: string;
  model: string;
  aspectRatio: string;
  imageSize: string;
  concurrency: number;
  workbenchCols: number;
  tasksCols: number;
  modelInjections: Record<string, string>;
}

// ─── 任务与 Job 类型 ───

export type JobStatus = 'submitting' | 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';

export interface Job {
  id?: string;
  status: JobStatus;
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
  images?: string[];
}

export interface Task {
  folderName: string;
  folderPath: string;
  mdFileName: string;
  model: string;
  jobs: Job[];
  startedAt: number;
  sessionStartedAt: number;
  status: 'active' | 'done';
}

// ─── 素材库类型 ───

export interface MaterialLib {
  name: string;
  path: string;
  images: string[];
  isAuto: boolean;
}

// ─── Markdown 信息 ───

export interface MdInfo {
  path: string;
  fileName: string;
}

// ─── 消息协议 ───

export type ExtMessage =
  | { type: 'init'; config: AppConfig; currentMd: MdInfo | null; tasks: Task[]; history: HistoryItem[]; materialLibs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'configUpdate'; config: Partial<AppConfig> }
  | { type: 'taskUpdate'; tasks: Task[] }
  | { type: 'historyUpdate'; history: HistoryItem[] }
  | { type: 'materialLibsUpdate'; libs: MaterialLib[] }
  | { type: 'currentMdUpdate'; md: MdInfo | null }
  | { type: 'error'; message: string }
  | { type: 'generationStarted' };

export type WebviewMessage =
  | { type: 'init' }
  | { type: 'generate' }
  | { type: 'previewRequest' }
  | { type: 'setConfig'; key: string; value: unknown }
  | { type: 'addMaterialLib' }
  | { type: 'removeMaterialLib'; path: string }
  | { type: 'openImage'; path: string }
  | { type: 'insertReference'; imagePath: string }
  | { type: 'openExternalUrl'; url: string };

// ─── 历史记录 ───

export interface HistoryItem {
  folderName: string;
  folderPath: string;
  imageCount: number;
  images: string[];
}

// ─── Markdown 解析结果 ───

export interface ImageRef {
  alt: string;
  path: string;
  index: number;
}

export interface ParsedResult {
  references: ImageRef[];
  replacedText: string;
}

// ─── API 类型 ───

export interface GenerateRequest {
  model: string;
  prompt: string;
  images?: string[];
  aspectRatio?: string;
  imageSize?: string;
  replyType: 'json' | 'async';
}

export interface ApiResultItem {
  url: string;
}

export interface GenerateResponse {
  id?: string;
  status: 'running' | 'succeeded' | 'failed' | 'violation';
  results?: ApiResultItem[];
  progress?: number;
  error?: string;
}

export type ModelFamily = 'nano-banana' | 'gpt-image-2' | 'gpt-image-2-vip';

// ─── 预览类型 ───

export interface PreviewContent {
  prompt: string;
  endpoint: string;
  requestParams: string;
  referenceOverview: string;
}

```

##### 👀 Read `extension.ts`

```typescript
/**
 * image-flow 扩展入口（spec §3）。
 * M1：注册命令，对接生成流程。侧栏 Provider 为占位，M2 充实。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { generateForMarkdown } from './generate';

export function activate(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): void {
  // ─── 命令：生成 AI 图片 ───

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.generateImage', async (uri?: vscode.Uri) => {
      try {
        // 优先用传入的 URI（资源管理器右键），其次活动编辑器
        const targetUri = uri ?? vscode.window.activeTextEditor?.document.uri;
        if (!targetUri) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('请先打开一个 Markdown 文件');
          return;
        }
        if (!targetUri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
          vscode.window.showErrorMessage('仅支持 Markdown (.md) 文件');
          return;
        }

        await generateForMarkdown(context, targetUri);
      } catch (err) {
        vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：${err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err)}`);
      }
    }),
  );

  // ─── 命令：预览请求（M5 实现，M1 占位） ───

  context.subscriptions.push(
    vscode.commands.registerCommand('image-flow.previewRequest', async () => {
      vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本中实现');
    }),
  );

  // ─── 侧栏 Provider（M2 实现，M1 占位） ───

  // M1 暂不注册 webview，侧栏不可见。
  // M2 将通过 registerWebviewViewProvider 注册完整侧栏。
}

export function deactivate(): void {
  // M3 做持久化时补充清理逻辑
}

```
</details>

```diff
@@ -1,5 +1,26 @@-  // ─── 侧栏 Provider（M2 实现，M1 占位） ───
+  // ─── 侧栏 Provider（M1 占位，M2 充实） ───
 
-  // M1 暂不注册 webview，侧栏不可见。
-  // M2 将通过 registerWebviewViewProvider 注册完整侧栏。
+  const sidebarProvider = new PlaceholderSidebarProvider(context.extensionUri);

+    vscode.window.registerWebviewViewProvider('image-flow.sidebar', sidebarProvider),
+  );
 }
+
+/** M1 占位侧栏 Provider */
+class PlaceholderSidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
+  constructor(private readonly extensionUri: vscode.Uri) {}
+
+  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
+    webviewView.webview.options = {
+      enableScripts: false,
+      localResourceRoots: [vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.extensionUri, 'media')],
+    };
+    webviewView.webview.html = `<!DOCTYPE html>
+<html lang="zh-CN">
+<head><meta charset="UTF-8"></head>
+<body style="padding:16px;font-family:sans-serif;color:var(--vscode-foreground);">
+  <p>右键 Markdown 文件 → "Image Flow: 生成 AI 图片" 即可开始使用。</p>
+</body>
+</html>`;
+  }
+}
```

> The user wants me to implement M2: sidebar with React frontend, config management (globalState + secrets), three tabs, instant save.
> 
> Let me plan the M2 implementation:
> 
> 1. **Config system upgrade**: Move from workspace configuration to globalState (except apiKey which stays in secrets). Single-field instant save via postMessage. Material library paths in workspaceState.
> 
> 2. **Webview React frontend**:
>    - `src/webview/index.tsx` - Entry point with React root, message listener
>    - Three tab components: Workbench, Tasks, Settings
>    - CSS: `media/sidebar.css`
>    - Build: esbuild for webview (IIFE, platform=browser)
> 
> 3. **SidebarProvider upgrade**: Replace placeholder with full WebviewViewProvider
>    - CSP with nonce for scripts
>    - localResourceRoots
>    - postMessage bidirectional
>    - Handle all webview messages
> 
> 4. **esbuild config**: Add webview build target
> 
> 5. **Config system details**:
>    - apiKey → secrets
>    - Everything else → globalState (patch semantics)
>    - Material libs → workspaceState
>    - On init, seed modelInjections for gpt-image-2 models (wait, that's M6 actually... let me re-read the spec)
>    
>    Looking at §4.3: "首次激活时把种子写入配置" - this is the model injection seeding. But M6 is "提示词注入". The question is whether seeding belongs in M2 or M6.
>    
>    Looking at the plan: M2 config should handle the infrastructure, but the actual seeding logic (which models get what default text) is M6. For M2, I just need the config infrastructure to support modelInjections, but the seeding can wait for M6.
> 
> Actually, re-reading more carefully: §4.3 says "激活时必须先完成种入再注册侧栏". This means the seeding needs to happen during activation, BEFORE the sidebar is registered. So the seeding at least partially belongs in M2 if the sidebar is being registered in M2.
> 
> But the implementation plan says M6 for seeding. Let me split the difference: in M2, I'll add the modelInjections config read/write and the settings UI for it, but the actual seed values and the "only add if key doesn't exist" logic will be in M6. In M2, I'll add a placeholder seeding function that M6 will fill in.
> 
> Actually, looking at the spec more carefully, I think the reasonable approach is:
> - M2: Config infrastructure (globalState read/write), Settings tab UI with model injection editor
> - M6: Seed values, IMAGES.md injection, activation order
> 
> Let me now plan the files:
> 
> ### Files to create/modify:
> 
> 1. **`src/config.ts`** - Rewrite to use globalState for config (except apiKey in secrets), single-field patch, material libs in workspaceState
> 2. **`src/sidebar-provider.ts`** - Full WebviewViewProvider with postMessage, CSP, etc.
> 3. **`src/webview/index.tsx`** - React entry point
> 4. **`src/webview/App.tsx`** - Root component with tab switching
> 5. **`src/webview/WorkbenchTab.tsx`** - Workbench tab (generation controls)
> 6. **`src/webview/TasksTab.tsx`** - Tasks tab (placeholder for M3)
> 7. **`src/webview/SettingsTab.tsx`** - Settings tab (all config)
> 8. **`media/sidebar.css`** - Full styles
> 9. **`esbuild.config.mjs`** - Add webview build
> 10. **`esbuild.webview.config.mjs`** - Separate webview build config (or combine)
> 11. **`src/extension.ts`** - Update to use full sidebar provider
> 12. **`package.json`** - Add Radix UI dependencies
> 
> ### Message flow:
> - Webview sends `init` on mount → extension pushes config, currentMd, tasks, etc.
> - Webview sends `setConfig` on any field change → extension writes to globalState/secrets immediately
> - Extension sends `configUpdate` when config changes elsewhere
> 
> ### Config storage:
> - `apiKey` → `context.secrets`
> - Everything else → `context.globalState` (key: `image-flow.config`)
> - Material lib paths → `context.workspaceState` (key: `image-flow.materialLibs`)
> 
> ### Tab states preserved by CSS display toggle (not unmounting).
> 
> Let me now implement this step by step.
> 
> For the webview build, I need to bundle React + the webview code into an IIFE that runs in the browser. The webview tsconfig already has the right settings. I'll add a webview entry to esbuild config.
> 
> Actually, let me think about whether to use a separate esbuild config or combine them. Since the extension build and webview build are independent (different platforms, different outputs), I'll use a single config file that builds both.
> 
> Let me think about the React component structure:
> 
> ```
> App
> ├── WorkbenchTab (when active)
> │   ├── MaterialLibSection (M4)
> │   ├── Controls: model/aspectRatio/imageSize selects + concurrency stepper
> │   ├── GenerateRow: mdFileName + preview button + generate button

> 
> The flow:
> 1. Extension reads config from globalState on activation
> 2. Webview sends `init` → extension responds with full config snapshot
> 3. User changes a setting in webview → webview sends `setConfig { key, value }`
> 4. Extension writes to globalState/secrets → sends `configUpdate` back to webview
> 5. If apiKey is set, write to secrets; if other config, write to globalState
> 
> The `globalState` key for config: `image-flow.config` stores the full AppConfig object (minus apiKey).

```typescript
/**
 * 配置读写（spec §4）。
 * apiKey 走 VS Code Secrets，其余配置走 globalState（patch 语义），
 * 素材库路径走 workspaceState（按工作区隔离）。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import { AppConfig } from './shared';

const GLOBAL_KEY = 'image-flow.config';
const MATERIAL_LIBS_KEY = 'image-flow.materialLibs';
const API_KEY_SECRET = 'image-flow.apiKey';

const DEFAULTS: Omit<AppConfig, 'apiKey'> = {
  baseUrl: 'https://grsai.dakka.com.cn',
  model: 'nano-banana-2',
  aspectRatio: '3:4',
  imageSize: '1K',
  concurrency: 1,
  workbenchCols: 4,
  tasksCols: 2,
  modelInjections: {},
};

// ========== apiKey（Secrets） ==========

export async function getApiKey(secrets: vscode.SecretStorage): Promise<string> {
  return (await secrets.get(API_KEY_SECRET)) ?? '';
}

export async function setApiKey(secrets: vscode.SecretStorage, key: string): Promise<void> {
  await secrets.store(API_KEY_SECRET, key);
}

// ========== 其余配置（globalState） ==========

/** 读取完整配置快照。apiKey 需调用方从 secrets 填入。 */
export function getConfig(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Omit<AppConfig, 'apiKey'> {
  const stored = context.globalState.get<Partial<AppConfig>>(GLOBAL_KEY);
  return { ...DEFAULTS, ...stored };
}

/** 单字段 patch 写入 globalState，与已有字段合并。 */
export async function updateConfig(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  key: keyof AppConfig,
  value: unknown,
): Promise<void> {
  const current = context.globalState.get<Partial<AppConfig>>(GLOBAL_KEY) ?? {};
  (current as Record<string, unknown>)[key] = value;
  await context.globalState.update(GLOBAL_KEY, current);
}

// ========== 素材库路径（workspaceState） ==========

export function getMaterialLibPaths(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): string[] {
  return context.workspaceState.get<string[]>(MATERIAL_LIBS_KEY) ?? [];
}

export async function setMaterialLibPaths(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  paths: string[],
): Promise<void> {
  await context.workspaceState.update(MATERIAL_LIBS_KEY, paths);
}

// ========== 便捷方法 ==========

/** 拼装完整 AppConfig（含 apiKey）。 */
export async function getAppConfig(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<AppConfig> {
  const cfg = getConfig(context);
  const apiKey = await getApiKey(context.secrets);
  return { ...cfg, apiKey };
}

/** 校验 apiKey 已配置，未配置则弹输入框让用户填写并存入 Secrets。 */
export async function ensureApiKey(context: vscode.ExtensionContext): Promise<string> {
  let apiKey = await getApiKey(context.secrets);
  if (!apiKey) {
    apiKey = await vscode.window.showInputBox({
      prompt: '请输入 Grsai API Key（获取：https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys）',
      placeHolder: 'sk-...',
      password: true,
      ignoreFocusOut: true,
    }) ?? '';
    if (apiKey) {
      await setApiKey(context.secrets, apiKey);
    }
  }
  if (!apiKey) {
    throw new Error('API Key 未配置');
  }
  return apiKey;
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 生成流程编排（spec §7）。
 * M1 使用同步等待方式：提交 → 轮询 → 下载。
 * 异步任务机制（定时器、持久化、重启续拉）在 M3 补齐。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as path from 'node:path';
import * as fs from 'node:fs/promises';
import { parseReferences, validateNotEmpty } from './markdown-parser';
import { submitGenerate, queryResult } from './api';
import { mimeFromPath, extFromUrl } from './image-utils';
import { getConfig, ensureApiKey } from './config';
import type { GenerateResponse } from './shared';

// ─── 工具 ───

function sleep(ms: number): Promise<void> {
  return new Promise((r) => setTimeout(r, ms));
}

/** 格式化时间戳：yyMMddHHmmSS */
function timestamp(): string {
  const now = new Date();
  const y = String(now.getFullYear()).slice(2);
  const M = String(now.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const d = String(now.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  const h = String(now.getHours()).padStart(2, '0');
  const m = String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2, '0');
  const s = String(now.getSeconds()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${y}${M}${d}${h}${m}${s}`;
}

/** 已有的同秒任务文件夹数 → seq */
async function nextSeq(parentDir: string, ts: string): Promise<number> {
  let seq = 1;
  const prefix = `task-${ts}-`;
  try {
    const entries = await fs.readdir(parentDir);
    const existing = entries.filter((n) => n.startsWith(prefix));
    const nums = existing
      .map((n) => parseInt(n.slice(prefix.length), 10))
      .filter((n) => !isNaN(n));
    if (nums.length > 0) {
      seq = Math.max(...nums) + 1;
    }
  } catch {
    // 目录不存在或无权限，seq 从 1 开始
  }
  return seq;
}

// ─── 下载 ───

/** 下载单张图片到指定路径，返回文件绝对路径 */
async function downloadImage(url: string, filePath: string): Promise<string> {
  const controller = new AbortController();
  const timer = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), 30_000);

  try {
    const response = await fetch(url, { signal: controller.signal });
    const buffer = Buffer.from(await response.arrayBuffer());
    await fs.writeFile(filePath, buffer);
    return filePath;
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timer);
  }
}

/** 从 URL 提取安全扩展名（校验白名单，否则回退 png） */
function safeExt(url: string): string {
  return extFromUrl(url) || 'png';
}

// ─── 轮询等待 ───

const POLL_INTERVAL = 2_000; // 2s
const POLL_TIMEOUT = 10 * 60 * 1_000; // 10 分钟

/** 同步等待异步任务完成（M1 简化实现） */
async function waitForCompletion(
  baseUrl: string,
  apiKey: string,
  jobId: string,
): Promise<GenerateResponse> {
  const start = Date.now();
  while (Date.now() - start < POLL_TIMEOUT) {
    await sleep(POLL_INTERVAL);
    const result = await queryResult(baseUrl, apiKey, jobId);
    if (result.status === 'succeeded' || result.status === 'failed' || result.status === 'violation') {
      return result;
    }
    // running — 继续等待
  }
  throw new Error('生成超时（10 分钟）');
}

// ─── 主流程 ───

/** 读取 Markdown 文件所在目录同级参考图，转为 data URI */
async function readReferenceImages(
  mdDir: string,
  refPaths: string[],
): Promise<string[]> {
  const errors: string[] = [];
  const images: string[] = [];

  for (const refPath of refPaths) {
    const resolved = path.resolve(mdDir, refPath);
    try {
      const buffer = await fs.readFile(resolved);
      const mime = mimeFromPath(resolved);
      const b64 = buffer.toString('base64');
      images.push(`data:${mime};base64,${b64}`);
    } catch {
      errors.push(refPath);
    }
  }

  if (errors.length > 0) {
    throw new Error(`参考图读取失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
  }

  return images;
}

/**
 * 对单个 Markdown 文件执行生成流程。
 * 这是 M1 的核心——同步等待完成。
 */
export async function generateForMarkdown(
  context: vscode.ExtensionContext,
  mdUri: vscode.Uri,
): Promise<void> {
  // 1. 校验 apiKey
  const apiKey = await ensureApiKey(context);

  // 2. 读取 Markdown 内容
  const mdContent = Buffer.from(await vscode.workspace.fs.readFile(mdUri)).toString('utf-8');
  validateNotEmpty(mdContent);

  // 3. 解析参考图
  const { references, replacedText } = parseReferences(mdContent);

  // 4. 读取参考图并编码
  const mdDir = path.dirname(mdUri.fsPath);
  const refPaths = references.map((r) => r.path);
  const images = await readReferenceImages(mdDir, refPaths);

  // 5. 获取配置
  const config = getConfig();
  const mdFileName = path.basename(mdUri.fsPath, '.md');

  // 6. 创建任务文件夹
  const ts = timestamp();
  const seq = await nextSeq(mdDir, ts);
  const folderName = `task-${ts}-${seq}`;
  const folderPath = path.join(mdDir, folderName);
  await fs.mkdir(folderPath, { recursive: true });

  // 7. 并发提交 N 个 job
  const N = config.concurrency;
  const submitResults: { ok: boolean; response?: GenerateResponse; error?: string }[] = [];
  const submitPromises = Array.from({ length: N }, () =>
    submitGenerate(config.baseUrl, apiKey, {
      model: config.model,
      prompt: replacedText,
      images: images.length > 0 ? images : undefined,
      aspectRatio: config.aspectRatio,
      imageSize: config.imageSize,
      replyType: 'json',
    }).then(
      (resp) => ({ ok: true, response: resp }),
      (err) => ({ ok: false, error: String(err) }),
    ),
  );

  const settled = await Promise.all(submitPromises);
  submitResults.push(...settled);

  // 8. 全部提交失败 → 作废、删空文件夹、报错
  const allFailed = submitResults.every((r) => !r.ok);
  if (allFailed) {
    const errors = [...new Set(submitResults.map((r) => r.error!))];
    await fs.rmdir(folderPath);
    vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`所有请求提交失败：\n${errors.join('\n')}`);
    return;
  }

  // 9. 逐个等待完成并下载
  let imageIndex = 0;
  let hasSuccess = false;
  const failures: string[] = [];

  for (const result of submitResults) {
    if (!result.ok || !result.response) {
      failures.push(result.error ?? '提交失败');
      continue;
    }

    let final = result.response;

    // 如果返回 running，等待完成
    if (final.status === 'running') {
      try {
        final = await waitForCompletion(config.baseUrl, apiKey, final.id!);
      } catch (err) {
        failures.push(String(err));
        continue;
      }
    }

    if (final.status === 'succeeded' && final.results) {
      for (const item of final.results) {
        imageIndex++;
        const ext = safeExt(item.url);
        const fileName = `${mdFileName}-${imageIndex}.${ext}`;
        const filePath = path.join(folderPath, fileName);
        await downloadImage(item.url, filePath);
      }
      hasSuccess = true;
    } else {
      const errMsg = final.error ?? `状态: ${final.status}`;
      failures.push(errMsg);
    }
  }

  // 10. 通知
  if (failures.length > 0) {
    const unique = [...new Set(failures)];
    if (hasSuccess) {
      vscode.window.showWarningMessage(`部分图片生成失败：\n${unique.join('\n')}`);
    } else {
      // 无成图 → 删空文件夹 + 错误通知
      try { await fs.rmdir(folderPath); } catch { /* 文件夹不空则忽略 */ }
      vscode.window.showErrorMessage(`生成失败：\n${unique.join('\n')}`);
    }
  } else {
    vscode.window.showInformationMessage(`生成完成，图片已保存到 ${folderName}`);
  }
}

```
</details>

```typescript
/**
 * 侧栏 WebviewViewProvider（spec §8）。
 * 负责 Webview 生命周期、CSP、postMessage 双向通信。
 */

import * as vscode from 'vscode';
import * as crypto from 'node:crypto';
import { getAppConfig, getConfig, updateConfig, setApiKey } from './config';
import { AppConfig, MdInfo, ExtMessage, WebviewMessage } from './shared';

export class SidebarProvider implements vscode.WebviewViewProvider {
  private _view?: vscode.WebviewView;
  private _currentMd: MdInfo | null = null;

  constructor(private readonly context: vscode.ExtensionContext) {}

  resolveWebviewView(webviewView: vscode.WebviewView): void {
    this._view = webviewView;
    const extUri = this.context.extensionUri;

    webviewView.webview.options = {
      enableScripts: true,
      localResourceRoots: [
        vscode.Uri.joinPath(extUri, 'media'),
        ...(vscode.workspace.workspaceFolders?.map(f => f.uri) ?? []),
      ],
    };

    const nonce = crypto.randomBytes(16).toString('base64');
    webviewView.webview.html = this.buildHtml(webviewView.webview, nonce);

    // 双向消息
    webviewView.webview.onDidReceiveMessage(async (msg: WebviewMessage) => {
      await this.handleMessage(msg, webviewView.webview);
    });

    // 监听活动编辑器变化 → 通知前端
    this.context.subscriptions.push(
      vscode.window.onDidChangeActiveTextEditor(async (editor) => {
        await this.trackActiveEditor(webviewView.webview, editor);
      }),
    );

    // 初始跟踪当前编辑器
    this.trackActiveEditor(webviewView.webview, vscode.window.activeTextEditor);
  }

  /** 向 Webview 发送消息 */
  postMessage(msg: ExtMessage): void {
    this._view?.webview.postMessage(msg);
  }

  // ========== 消息处理 ==========

  private async handleMessage(msg: WebviewMessage, webview: vscode.Webview): Promise<void> {
    switch (msg.type) {
      case 'init': {
        const config = await getAppConfig(this.context);
        this.postMessage({
          type: 'init',
          config,
          currentMd: this._currentMd,
          tasks: [],
          history: [],
          materialLibs: [],
        });
        break;
      }
      case 'generate': {
        // M3 异步任务后充实，M2 暂走 M1 同步流程
        if (this._currentMd) {
          try {
            const { generateForMarkdown } = await import('./generate');
            const uri = vscode.Uri.file(this._currentMd.path);
            await generateForMarkdown(this.context, uri);
          } catch (err) {
            const msg = err instanceof Error ? err.message : String(err);
            this.postMessage({ type: 'error', message: msg });
          }
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'previewRequest': {
        vscode.window.showInformationMessage('预览请求功能将在后续版本中实现');
        break;
      }
      case 'setConfig': {
        if (msg.key === 'apiKey') {
          await setApiKey(this.context.secrets, String(msg.value));
          // secrets 不回传，仅通知前端已保存
          this.postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', config: { apiKey: '••••••' } as Partial<AppConfig> });
        } else {
          await updateConfig(this.context, msg.key as keyof AppConfig, msg.value);
          const updated = getConfig(this.context);
          this.postMessage({ type: 'configUpdate', config: { ...updated, apiKey: '' } as Partial<AppConfig> });
        }
        break;
      }
      case 'openExternalUrl': {
        await vscode.env.openExternal(vscode.Uri.parse(msg.url));
        break;
      }
      case 'addMaterialLib':
      case 'removeMaterialLib':
      case 'openImage':
      case 'insertReference':
        // M4 实现
        break;
    }
  }

  // ========== 编辑器跟踪 ==========

  private async trackActiveEditor(
    webview: vscode.Webview,
    editor: vscode.TextEditor | undefined,
  ): Promise<void> {
    const doc = editor?.document;
    if (doc && doc.uri.fsPath.endsWith('.md')) {
      const newMd: MdInfo = {
        path: doc.uri.fsPath,
        fileName: doc.fileName.split(/[/\\]/).pop() ?? doc.fileName,
      };
      // 仅在 MD 变化时推送
      if (!this._currentMd || this._currentMd.path !== newMd.path) {
        this._currentMd = newMd;
        this.postMessage({ type: 'currentMdUpdate', md: newMd });
      }
    }
    // 非 MD 不清空 currentMd（spec §8.2）
  }

  // ========== HTML 构造 ==========

  private buildHtml(webview: vscode.Webview, nonce: string): string {
    const sidebarUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.js'),
    );
    const styleUri = webview.asWebviewUri(
      vscode.Uri.joinPath(this.context.extensionUri, 'media', 'sidebar.css'),
    );
    const cspSource = webview.cspSource;

    return `<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="zh-CN">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
        content="default-src 'none';
                 img-src ${cspSource} data: https:;
                 style-src ${cspSource} 'unsafe-inline';
                 script-src 'nonce-${nonce}';
                 font-src ${cspSource};">
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="${styleUri}">
</head>
<body>
  <div id="root"></div>
  <script nonce="${nonce}" src="${sidebarUri}"></script>
</body>
</html>`;
  }
}

```

```typescript
/**
 * Webview 根组件。
 * 三标签页：工作台 / 任务 / 设置。
 * 使用 Radix Tabs，切换保留各页内部状态。
 */

import React, { useState, useCallback, useEffect } from 'react';
import * as Tabs from '@radix-ui/react-tabs';
import WorkbenchTab from './WorkbenchTab';
import TasksTab from './TasksTab';
import SettingsTab from './SettingsTab';
import { AppConfig, MdInfo, Task, HistoryItem, MaterialLib, ExtMessage, WebviewMessage } from '../shared';

const vscodeApi = (window as any).acquireVsCodeApi?.() ?? {
  postMessage: (_msg: WebviewMessage) => {},
  getState: () => ({}),
  setState: (_s: unknown) => {},
};

export default function App(): React.ReactElement {
  const [config, setConfig] = useState<AppConfig | null>(null);
  const [currentMd, setCurrentMd] = useState<MdInfo | null>(null);
  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
  const [history, setHistory] = useState<HistoryItem[]>([]);
  const [materialLibs, setMaterialLibs] = useState<MaterialLib[]>([]);
  const [errorMsg, setErrorMsg] = useState('');
  const [isGenerating, setIsGenerating] = useState(false);

  // 监听来自扩展的消息
  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = (ev: MessageEvent<ExtMessage>) => {
      const msg = ev.data;
      switch (msg.type) {
        case 'init':
          setConfig(msg.config);
          setCurrentMd(msg.currentMd);
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          setHistory(msg.history);
          setMaterialLibs(msg.materialLibs);
          break;
        case 'configUpdate':
          setConfig(prev => prev ? { ...prev, ...msg.config } : null);
          break;
        case 'taskUpdate':
          setTasks(msg.tasks);
          break;
        case 'historyUpdate':
          setHistory(msg.history);
          break;
        case 'currentMdUpdate':
          setCurrentMd(msg.md);
          break;
        case 'error':
          setErrorMsg(msg.message);
          setIsGenerating(false);
          break;
        case 'generationStarted':
          setIsGenerating(true);
          setErrorMsg('');
          break;
        case 'materialLibsUpdate':
          setMaterialLibs(msg.libs);
          break;
      }
    };
    window.addEventListener('message', handler);
    // 挂载后请求初始数据
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'init' });
    return () => window.removeEventListener('message', handler);
  }, []);

  const sendConfig = useCallback((key: string, value: unknown) => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'setConfig', key, value });
  }, []);

  const handleGenerate = useCallback(() => {
    vscodeApi.postMessage({ type: 'generate' });
  }, []);

  if (!config) {
    return <div className="loading">加载中…</div>;
  }

  return (
    <Tabs.Root className="tabs-root" defaultValue="workbench">
      <Tabs.List className="tabs-list" aria-label="标签页">
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="workbench">工作台</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="tasks">任务</Tabs.Trigger>
        <Tabs.Trigger className="tabs-trigger" value="settings">设置</Tabs.Trigger>
      </Tabs.List>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="workbench" forceMount style={{ display: 'none' }}>
        <WorkbenchTab
          config={config}
          currentMd={currentMd}
          isGenerating={isGenerating}
          errorMsg={errorMsg}
          materialLibs={materialLibs}
          onConfigChange={sendConfig}
          onGenerate={handleGenerate}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="tasks" forceMount style={{ display: 'none' }}>
        <TasksTab
          tasks={tasks}
          history={history}
          tasksCols={config.tasksCols}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>

      <Tabs.Content className="tabs-content" value="settings" forceMount style={{ display: 'none' }}>
        <SettingsTab
          config={config}
          onConfigChange={sendConfig}
        />
      </Tabs.Content>
    </Tabs.Root>
  );
}
```

```typescript
/**
 * 工作台标签页（spec §8.3）。
 * 上部素材库区（M4）、底部控件行 + 生成行 + 状态行。
 */

import React from 'react';
import { AppConfig, MdInfo, MaterialLib } from '../shared';

interface Props {
  config: AppConfig;
  currentMd: MdInfo | null;
  isGenerating: boolean;
  errorMsg: string;
  materialLibs: MaterialLib[];
  onConfigChange: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
  onGenerate: () => void;
}

export default function WorkbenchTab(props: Props): React.ReactElement {
  const { config, currentMd, isGenerating, errorMsg, onConfigChange, onGenerate } = props;

  return (
    <div className="workbench">
      {/* 控件行 */}
      <div className="controls-row">
        <label className="control-label">
          模型
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.model}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('model', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
            <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
            <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>
            <option value="gpt-image-2-vip">gpt-image-2-vip</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          分辨率
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.imageSize}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('imageSize', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="1K">1K</option>
            <option value="2K">2K</option>
            <option value="4K">4K</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          比例
          <select
            className="control-select"
            value={config.aspectRatio}
            onChange={e => onConfigChange('aspectRatio', e.target.value)}
          >
            <option value="1:1">1:1</option>
            <option value="3:4">3:4</option>
            <option value="16:9">16:9</option>
            <option value="9:16">9:16</option>
            <option value="4:3">4:3</option>
          </select>
        </label>

        <label className="control-label">
          并发
          <input
            type="number"
            className="control-number"
            min={1} max={10}
            value={config.concurrency}
            onChange={e => {
              const v = Math.max(1, Math.min(10, parseInt(e.target.value) || 1));
              onConfigChange('concurrency', v);
            }}
          />
        </label>
      </div>

      {/* 生成行 */}
      <div className="generate-row">
        <span className="current-md-name">
          {currentMd ? currentMd.fileName : '未打开 Markdown 文件'}
        </span>
        <button className="btn btn-secondary" onClick={() => {
          (window as any).acquireVsCodeApi?.()?.postMessage({ type: 'previewRequest' });
        }}>
          预览请求
        </button>
        <button
          className="btn btn-primary"
          disabled={isGenerating || !currentMd}
          onClick={onGenerate}
        >
          {isGenerating ? '生成中…' : '生成'}
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* 状态行 */}
      {errorMsg && <div className="status-line error">{errorMsg}</div>}
    </div>
  );
}
```

```typescript
/**
 * 任务标签页（spec §8.4）。
 * M2 占位——M3 异步任务机制 + M7 体验打磨后充实。
 */

import React from 'react';
import { Task, HistoryItem } from '../shared';

interface Props {
  tasks: Task[];
  history: HistoryItem[];
  tasksCols: number;
}

export default function TasksTab({ tasks, history }: Props): React.ReactElement {
  return (
    <div className="tasks-tab">
      {tasks.length === 0 && history.length === 0 ? (
        <p className="empty-hint">暂无任务。在工作台中点击「生成」开始。</p>
      ) : (
        <>
          {tasks.map(t => (
            <div key={t.folderName} className="task-card">
              <div className="task-card-title">{t.folderName}（{t.model}）</div>
              <div className="task-card-status">
                {t.jobs.filter(j => j.status === 'succeeded').length}/{t.jobs.length} 完成
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </>
      )}
    </div>
  );
}
```

```typescript
/**
 * 设置标签页（spec §8.5）。
 * API Key / 节点 / 列数 / 模型注入提示词编辑。
 * 所有控件 onChange 即时保存，无保存按钮。
 */

import React, { useState } from 'react';
import { AppConfig } from '../shared';

interface Props {
  config: AppConfig;
  onConfigChange: (key: string, value: unknown) => void;
}

export default function SettingsTab({ config, onConfigChange }: Props): React.ReactElement {
  // injection 编辑选择的模型（独立于工作台）
  const [injModel, setInjModel] = useState(config.model);

  return (
    <div className="settings">
      {/* API Key */}
      <div className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">API Key</label>
        <div className="setting-row">
          <input
            type="password"
            className="setting-input"
            placeholder="sk-..."
            defaultValue={config.apiKey ? '••••••••' : ''}
            onChange={e => {
              if (e.target.value && e.target.value !== '••••••••') {
                onConfigChange('apiKey', e.target.value);
              }
            }}
          />
          <button
            className="btn btn-link"
            onClick={() => {
              (window as any).acquireVsCodeApi?.()?.postMessage({
                type: 'openExternalUrl',
                url: 'https://grsai.ai/zh/dashboard/api-keys',
              });
            }}
          >
            获取 API Key →
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* 节点 */}
      <div className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">节点</label>
        <select
          className="setting-select"
          value={config.baseUrl}
          onChange={e => onConfigChange('baseUrl', e.target.value)}
        >
          <option value="https://grsai.dakka.com.cn">国内节点</option>
          <option value="https://grsaiapi.com">全球节点</option>
        </select>
      </div>

      {/* 工作台每行张数 */}
      <div className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">工作台每行缩略图数</label>
        <input
          type="number"
          className="setting-number"
          min={1} max={8}
          value={config.workbenchCols}
          onChange={e => {
            const v = Math.max(1, Math.min(8, parseInt(e.target.value) || 1));
            onConfigChange('workbenchCols', v);
          }}
        />
      </div>

      {/* 任务每行张数 */}
      <div className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">任务页每行缩略图数</label>
        <input
          type="number"
          className="setting-number"
          min={1} max={8}
          value={config.tasksCols}
          onChange={e => {
            const v = Math.max(1, Math.min(8, parseInt(e.target.value) || 1));
            onConfigChange('tasksCols', v);
          }}
        />
      </div>

      {/* 模型注入提示词 */}
      <div className="setting-group">
        <label className="setting-label">模型注入提示词</label>
        <select
          className="setting-select"
          value={injModel}
          onChange={e => setInjModel(e.target.value)}
        >
          <option value="nano-banana-2">nano-banana-2</option>
          <option value="nano-banana-pro">nano-banana-pro</option>
          <option value="gpt-image-2">gpt-image-2</option>
          <option value="gpt-image-2-vip">gpt-image-2-vip</option>
        </select>
        <textarea
          className="setting-textarea"
          rows={4}
          placeholder="该模型的前置注入提示词（可选）"
          value={config.modelInjections[injModel] ?? ''}
          onChange={e => {
            const updated = { ...config.modelInjections, [injModel]: e.target.value };
            onConfigChange('modelInjections', updated);
          }}
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}
```
